NV_BASIC.name: Basic Skill
NV_BASIC.description:
Max Level: 9
Enables the use of Basic Interface Skills. 
[Lv 1]: Enables Trading
Allows the trading of items with other
character.
Right click on a character to initiate. 
[Lv 2]: Enables Emotions
Alt+(0~9) and Ctrl+(1,-,=.)
Alt+L opens additional Emotion icons. 
[Lv 3]: Enables Sitting
Sitting doubles HP and SP regeneration
speed.
Press the Insert key or type /sit. 
[Lv 4]: Enables Chat Room Creation
Alt+C to open a Chat Room or click the
Chat button in the Basic Information
Window. 
[Lv 5]: Join a Party
Character can join a party. 
[Lv 6]: Enables Use of Kafra Storage
Allows use of Kafra Storage. 
[Lv 7]: Organize a Party
Create a party by typing
/organize ''Party Name''
Set party options in the Party Window (Alt+Z). 
[Lv 9]: Enables Change to First Job Class
Qualifies character for change from Novice
to one of the First classes.

[Lv 2]: 14% of MaxHP, block 6 attacks 
[Lv 3]: 16% of MaxHP, block 6 attacks 
[Lv 4]: 18% of MaxHP, block 7 attacks 
[Lv 5]: 20% of MaxHP, block 7 attacks 
[Lv 6]: 22% of MaxHP, block 8 attacks 
[Lv 7]: 24% of MaxHP, block 8 attacks 
[Lv 8]: 26% of MaxHP, block 9 attacks 
[Lv 9]: 28% of MaxHP, block 9 attacks 
[Lv 10]: 30% of MaxHP, block 10 attacks

PR_MAGNIFICAT.name: Magnificat
PR_MAGNIFICAT.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Doubles the caster and party's SP regen for the duration of the skill.

PR_GLORIA.name: Gloria
PR_GLORIA.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Adds 30 LUK to the caster and party members for the duration of the skill.

PR_LEXDIVINA.name: Lex Divina
PR_LEXDIVINA.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Silences an enemy, temporarily disabling its use of skills, for a set duration.

PR_TURNUNDEAD.name: Turn Undead
PR_TURNUNDEAD.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Magical attack 
Description: Attacks Undead monster with an exorcist skill that will cause a good deal of damage and has the chance of instantly killing the targeted Undead monster.

PR_LEXAETERNA.name: Lex Aeterna
PR_LEXAETERNA.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Weakens an enemy so that it will receive twice as much damage from the next attack that hits it. Ineffective against enemies afflicted by the Frozen or Stone Curse status.

PR_MAGNUS.name: Magnus Exorcismus
PR_MAGNUS.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Magical attack 
Description: Summons a purifying cross on the ground to exterminate Demon and Undead monsters.
Each cast requires 1 Blue Gemstone.

WZ_FIREPILLAR.name: Fire Pillar
WZ_FIREPILLAR.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Magical attack 
Element: Fire 
Description: Creates a Fire Pillar trap effect on the targeted cell.
Consumes 1 Blue Gemstone at level 6 and higher.

WZ_SIGHTRASHER.name: Sightrasher
WZ_SIGHTRASHER.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Magical attack 
Element: Fire 
Description: Attack enemies by shooting fireballs, which are first summoned by the Sight skill, in directions that radiate away from the caster.

WZ_METEOR.name: Meteor Storm
WZ_METEOR.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Magical attack 
Element: Fire 
Description: Summons meteors towards a targeted area to inflict area effect damage upon enemies

WZ_JUPITEL.name: Jupitel Thunder
WZ_JUPITEL.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Magical attack 
Element: Wind 
Description: Fires a ball of crackling lightning that will damage and push back the targeted enemy.

WZ_VERMILION.name: Lord of Vermillion
WZ_VERMILION.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Magical attack 
Element: Wind 
Description: Summons explosive lightning to strike a targeted area. Increasing skill level will increase damage and skill cast time.

WZ_WATERBALL.name: Water Ball
WZ_WATERBALL.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Magical attack 
Element: Water 
Description: Hurls spheres of water at high velocity at a targeted enemy.
Caster must be standing in water in order to cast Water Ball and cannot be used in an underwater map.

WZ_ICEWALL.name: Ice Wall
WZ_ICEWALL.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active 
Element: Water 
Description: Creates a frozen wall of ice that will block enemies.

WZ_FROSTNOVA.name: Frost Nova
WZ_FROSTNOVA.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Magical attack 
Element: Water 
Description: Creates an aura of icy cold that will simultaneously freeze enemies around the caster.

WZ_STORMGUST.name: Storm Gust
WZ_STORMGUST.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Magical attack 
Element: Water 
Description: Summons a blizzard on a targeted spot to damage enemies within Storm Gust's range.

WZ_EARTHSPIKE.name: Earth Spike
WZ_EARTHSPIKE.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Magical attack 
Element: Earth 
Description: Commands the ground beneath a targeted enemy to rise into pikes.

WZ_HEAVENDRIVE.name: Heaven's Drive
WZ_HEAVENDRIVE.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Magical attack 
Element: Earth 
Description: Commands the ground in a targeted area to rise into spikes in order to damage enemies within its range.

WZ_QUAGMIRE.name: Quagmire
WZ_QUAGMIRE.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Temporarily converts targeted area into marshland that will reduce the Movement Speed, AGI and DEX of all targets by half.
AGI and DEX has maximum of 50 can be reduced. Players will only receive half of the effect.

WZ_ESTIMATION.name: Sense
WZ_ESTIMATION.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Reveals detailed information about a targeted monster to the caster and members in caster's party.

BS_IRON.name: Iron Tempering
BS_IRON.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Passive 
Description: Enables the tempering of 1 Iron with 1 Iron Ore and 1 Mini Furnace.

BS_STEEL.name: Steel Tempering
BS_STEEL.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Passive 
Description: Enables the tempering of 1 Steel with 5 Iron, 1 Coal and 1 Mini Furnace.

BS_ENCHANTEDSTONE.name: Enchanted Stone Craft
BS_ENCHANTEDSTONE.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Passive 
Description: Enables the refining of enchanted ores with 10 Green Live, 10 Wind of Verdures, 10 Red Blood, 10 Crystal Blue, or 10 Star Dust with a Mini Furnace.

BS_ORIDEOCON.name: Research Oridecon
BS_ORIDEOCON.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Passive 
Description: Increases the success rate of forging items with Oridecon.

BS_DAGGER.name: Smith Dagger
BS_DAGGER.description:
Max Level: 3
Skill Form: Passive 
Description: Enables forging of Dagger class weapons.

BS_SWORD.name: Smith Sword
BS_SWORD.description:
Max Level: 3
Skill Form: Passive 
Description: Enables forging of Sword class weapons.

BS_TWOHANDSWORD.name: Smith Two-Handed Sword
BS_TWOHANDSWORD.description:
Max Level: 3
Skill Form: Passive 
Description: Enables forging of Two-Handed Sword class weapons.

BS_AXE.name: Smith Axe
BS_AXE.description:
Max Level: 3
Skill Form: Passive 
Description: Enables forging of Axe class weapons.

BS_MACE.name: Smith Mace
BS_MACE.description:
Max Level: 3
Skill Form: Passive 
Description: Enables forging of Mace class weapons.

BS_KNUCKLE.name: Smith Brass Knuckle
BS_KNUCKLE.description:
Max Level: 3
Skill Form: Passive 
Description: Enables forging of Knuckle class weapons.

BS_SPEAR.name: Smith Spear
BS_SPEAR.description:
Max Level: 3
Skill Form: Passive 
Description: Enables forging of Spear class weapons.

BS_HILTBINDING.name: Hilt Binding
BS_HILTBINDING.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Passive 
Description: Increases the duration of the Adrenaline Rush, Power Thrust and Weapon Perfection skills by 10%.
This skill also adds +1 STR and +4 ATK.

BS_FINDINGORE.name: Finding Ore
BS_FINDINGORE.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Passive 
Description: Increases the success rate of finding ores dropped from monsters.

BS_WEAPONRESEARCH.name: Weaponry Research
BS_WEAPONRESEARCH.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Passive 
Description: Improves weapon knowledge in order to create arms of higher quality.

BS_REPAIRWEAPON.name: Repair Weapon
BS_REPAIRWEAPON.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Repairs damaged weapons.
Names of weapons that have been damaged are displayed in red color. 
Armors: Steel 
Level 1 Weapon: Iron Ore 
Level 2 Weapon: Iron 
Level 3 Weapon: Steel 
Level 4 Weapon: Rough Oridecon

BS_SKINTEMPER.name: Skin Tempering
BS_SKINTEMPER.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Passive 
Description: Increases resistance to Fire and Neutral elemental attacks. 
[Lv 1]: Fire +5%, Neutral +1% 
[Lv 2]: Fire +10%, Neutral +2% 
[Lv 3]: Fire +15%, Neutral +3% 
[Lv 4]: Fire +20%, Neutral +4% 
[Lv 5]: Fire +25%, Neutral +5%

BS_HAMMERFALL.name: Hammer Fall
BS_HAMMERFALL.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Pounds a targeted cell to stun enemies in the impacts vicinity.
This can only be used when an Axe or Mace class weapon is equipped.

BS_ADRENALINE.name: Adrenaline Rush
BS_ADRENALINE.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Doubles the Attack Speed of Axe and Mace weapon for the duration of skill.

BS_WEAPONPERFECT.name: Weapon Perfection
BS_WEAPONPERFECT.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Nullifies any reduction in damage resulting from monster size.

BS_OVERTHRUST.name: Over Thrust
BS_OVERTHRUST.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Enhances the Attack Power of equipped weapon with a 0.1% chance of damaging that weapon. 
[Lv 1]: Damage +5% 
[Lv 2]: Damage +10% 
[Lv 3]: Damage +15% 
[Lv 4]: Damage +20% 
[Lv 5]: Damage +25%

BS_MAXIMIZE.name: Maximize Power
BS_MAXIMIZE.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Amplifies Weapon Attack Power by continuously draining a specific amount of SP while skill is active.
This skill can be canceled by casting it once again.

HT_SKIDTRAP.name: Skid Trap
HT_SKIDTRAP.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active, Trap 
Description: Sets a trap which will make an enemy slide in the direction that the caster was facing at the moment the trap was set.
Consumes 1 Trap. 
[Lv 1]: 6 cell sliding range, 300 sec 
[Lv 2]: 7 cell sliding range, 240 sec 
[Lv 3]: 8 cell sliding range, 180 sec 
[Lv 4]: 9 cell sliding range, 120 sec 
[Lv 5]: 10 cell sliding range, 60 sec

HT_LANDMINE.name: Land Mine
HT_LANDMINE.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active, Trap 
Description: Sets a trap which will explode once an enemy steps on it.
Consumes 1 Trap. 
[Lv 1]: 50% damage, 200 sec duration 
[Lv 2]: 75% damage, 160 sec duration 
[Lv 3]: 100% damage, 120 sec duration 
[Lv 4]: 125% damage, 80 sec duration 
[Lv 5]: 150% damage, 40 sec duration

HT_ANKLESNARE.name: Ankle Snare
HT_ANKLESNARE.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active, Trap 
Description: Sets a trap that will bind an enemy to the ground for the skill's duration, which is affected by the AGI of the target.
Consumes 1 Trap.

HT_SHOCKWAVE.name: Shockwave Trap
HT_SHOCKWAVE.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active, Trap 
Description: Sets a trap which will drain SP away from enemies.
Consumes 2 Traps. 
[Lv 1]: 20% MaxSP drain, 200 sec duration 
[Lv 2]: 35% MaxSP drain, 160 sec duration 
[Lv 3]: 50% MaxSP drain, 120 sec duration 
[Lv 4]: 65% MaxSP drain, 80 sec duration 
[Lv 5]: 80% MaxSP drain, 40 sec duration

HT_SANDMAN.name: Sandman
HT_SANDMAN.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active, Trap 
Description: Sets a trap that will cause the enemy that steps on it, as well as enemies within the trap's range, to fall asleep.
Consumes 1 Trap. 
[Lv 1]: 150 sec duration 
[Lv 2]: 120 sec duration 
[Lv 3]: 90 sec duration 
[Lv 4]: 60 sec duration 
[Lv 5]: 30 sec duration

HT_FLASHER.name: Flasher
HT_FLASHER.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active, Trap 
Description: Sets a trap which will emit intense light, which may inflict the target with the Blind status.
Consumes 2 Traps. 
[Lv 1]: 150 sec duration 
[Lv 2]: 120 sec duration 
[Lv 3]: 90 sec duration 
[Lv 4]: 60 sec duration 
[Lv 5]: 30 sec duration

HT_FREEZINGTRAP.name: Freezing Trap
HT_FREEZINGTRAP.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active, Trap 
Description: Sets a trap which will freeze an enemy once it has been triggered.
Consumes 2 Traps. 
[Lv 1]: 150 sec duration 
[Lv 2]: 120 sec duration 
[Lv 3]: 90 sec duration 
[Lv 4]: 60 sec duration 
[Lv 5]: 30 sec duration

HT_BLASTMINE.name: Blast Mine
HT_BLASTMINE.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active, Trap 
Description: Sets a trap that will automatically explode after a specific time period determined by the level of the skill.
Consumes 1 Trap. 
[Lv 1]: 10 sec duration 
[Lv 2]: 8 sec duration 
[Lv 3]: 6 sec duration 
[Lv 4]: 4 sec duration 
[Lv 5]: 2 sec duration

HT_CLAYMORETRAP.name: Claymore Trap
HT_CLAYMORETRAP.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active, Trap 
Description: Sets a trap which will inflict splashed damage.
Consumes 2 Traps. 
[Lv 1]: 20 sec duration 
[Lv 2]: 40 sec duration 
[Lv 3]: 60 sec duration 
[Lv 4]: 80 sec duration 
[Lv 5]: 100 sec duration

HT_REMOVETRAP.name: Remove Trap
HT_REMOVETRAP.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Removes a trap that has been set on the ground, as well as regain that Trap.

HT_TALKIEBOX.name: Talkie Box
HT_TALKIEBOX.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active, Trap 
Description: Sets a trap which will last for 600 seconds and will display a prepared message for the person who triggers it.
Consumes 1 Trap.

HT_BEASTBANE.name: Beast Bane
HT_BEASTBANE.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Passive 
Description: Increases Attack Power against Brute and Insect monsters. 
[Lv 1]: Damage +4 
[Lv 2]: Damage +8 
[Lv 3]: Damage +12 
[Lv 4]: Damage +16 
[Lv 5]: Damage +20 
[Lv 6]: Damage +24 
[Lv 7]: Damage +28 
[Lv 8]: Damage +32 
[Lv 9]: Damage +36 
[Lv 10]: Damage +40

HT_FALCON.name: Falconry Mastery
HT_FALCON.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Passive 
Description: Enables renting of a Falcon from the Hunter Guild.

HT_STEELCROW.name: Steel Crow
HT_STEELCROW.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Passive 
Description: Increases the damage inflicted by Falcon. 
[Lv 1]: Damage +6 
[Lv 2]: Damage +12 
[Lv 3]: Damage +18 
[Lv 4]: Damage +24 
[Lv 5]: Damage +30 
[Lv 6]: Damage +36 
[Lv 7]: Damage +42 
[Lv 8]: Damage +48 
[Lv 9]: Damage +54 
[Lv 10]: Damage +60

HT_BLITZBEAT.name: Blitz Beat
HT_BLITZBEAT.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Physical attack 
Description: Commands Falcon to attack a targeted enemy. Leveling this skill also increases the chance of automatic attacks from the Falcon when attacking an enemy with a Bow Class Weapon.
The Falcon's Attack Range is equal to the level of Vulture's Eye skill +3.

HT_DETECTING.name: Detect
HT_DETECTING.description:
Max Level: 4
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Commands a Falcon to detect hidden enemies from a distance.

HT_SPRINGTRAP.name: Spring Trap
HT_SPRINGTRAP.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Commands Falcon to remove a set trap from a distance.

AS_RIGHT.name: Right-Hand Mastery
AS_RIGHT.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Passive 
Description: Increases the damage of the weapon in the right hand when equipped with dual weapons.
Equipping two weapons at once reduces the Attack Power of the weapon in the right hand to only 50%. 
[Lv 1]: 60% damage 
[Lv 2]: 70% damage 
[Lv 3]: 80% damage 
[Lv 4]: 90% damage 
[Lv 5]: 100% damage

AS_LEFT.name: Left-Hand Mastery
AS_LEFT.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Passive 
Description: Increases the damage of the weapon in the left hand when equipped with dual weapons.
Equipping two weapons at once reduces the Attack Power of the weapon in the left hand to only 30%. 
[Lv 1]: 40% damage 
[Lv 2]: 50% damage 
[Lv 3]: 60% damage 
[Lv 4]: 70% damage 
[Lv 5]: 80% damage

AS_KATAR.name: Katar Mastery
AS_KATAR.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Passive 
Description: Increases damaged inflicted with Katar class weapons. 
[Lv 1]: Damage +3 
[Lv 2]: Damage +6 
[Lv 3]: Damage +9 
[Lv 4]: Damage +12 
[Lv 5]: Damage +15 
[Lv 6]: Damage +18 
[Lv 7]: Damage +21 
[Lv 8]: Damage +24 
[Lv 9]: Damage +27 
[Lv 10]: Damage +30

AS_CLOAKING.name: Cloaking
AS_CLOAKING.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Initiates Cloaking status, which hide the caster from enemies without disabling movement.
At Levels 1 to 2, Cloaking will only work when caster is adjacent to a wall. At higher levels, caster can move freely in Cloaking status, but will move more slowly when away from walls.

AS_SONICBLOW.name: Sonic Blow
AS_SONICBLOW.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Physical attack 
Description: Directs a flurry of rapid Katar strikes that will have a chance of inflicting the Stun status on the target.
Requires Katar class weapon.

AS_GRIMTOOTH.name: Grimtooth
AS_GRIMTOOTH.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Physical attack 
Description: Strikes an enemy with Katar while in Hiding status.
Requires Katar class weapon.

AS_ENCHANTPOISON.name: Enchant Poison
AS_ENCHANTPOISON.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Temporarily enchants equipped weapon with the Poison elemental.
Poison enchanted weapons have a chance of inflicting targets with the Poison status.

AS_POISONREACT.name: Poison React
AS_POISONREACT.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Once this skill activated, the caster will automatically cast Envenom after receiving damage from normal attacks.
If the enemy uses Poison elemental attacks, the caster will reflect the damage instead.

AS_VENOMDUST.name: Venom Dust
AS_VENOMDUST.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Contaminates a targeted area with toxin that will inflict the Poison status on enemies that come into contact with it.

AS_SPLASHER.name: Venom Splasher
AS_SPLASHER.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active 
Description: When struck by this skill, the target will then explode after a few seconds, dealing splash damage around it and poisoning enemies by chance.
Each cast requires 1 Red Gemstone.

NV_FIRSTAID.name: First Aid
NV_FIRSTAID.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Uses 3 SP to restore 5 HP.

NV_TRICKDEAD.name: Play Dead
NV_TRICKDEAD.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Feign death to avoid the menace of nearby enemies. The Play Dead status is cancelled by casting this skill again.

SM_MOVINGRECOVERY.name: Moving HP Recovery
SM_MOVINGRECOVERY.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Passive 
Description: Enables HP regen while moving.
Only 25% of the HP that is recovered while standing is restored during movement.
The Increase Recovery skill does not affect HP Recovery While Moving.

SM_FATALBLOW.name: Fatal Blow
SM_FATALBLOW.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Passive 
Description: Causes Stun status on targeted enemy when using Level 6 Bash or higher. The chance of inflicting Stun increases with Bash skill level and Base Level of the caster.

SM_AUTOBERSERK.name: Auto Berserk
SM_AUTOBERSERK.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Passive with activation 
Description: Empowered by rage, character enters condition that is equivalent to Level 10 Provoke status when HP is reduced to less than 25% of MaxHP.
Provoked status lasts until character HP is restored to more than 25% of MaxHP or if Provoke effect is nullified.

AC_MAKINGARROW.name: Arrow Crafting
AC_MAKINGARROW.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Creates arrows from an item. Different items give different amounts and types of arrows. Cannot be used if above 50% weight.

AC_CHARGEARROW.name: Charge Arrow
AC_CHARGEARROW.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Physical attack 
Description: Draws the bowstring to its limit to fire a volley of arrows with enough force to push the target 4 cells back.

TF_SPRINKLESAND.name: Sprinkle Sand
TF_SPRINKLESAND.description:
Skill Form: Physical attack 
Description: Kicks sand into enemy face which will inflict 130% damage and also chance to cause Blind or Stun on the target.

TF_BACKSLIDING.name: Back Slide
TF_BACKSLIDING.description:
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Quickly move backwards to position yourself safely away from threats.

TF_PICKSTONE.name: Pick Stone
TF_PICKSTONE.description:
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Picks up a Stone from the ground.

TF_THROWSTONE.name: Throw Stone
TF_THROWSTONE.description:
Skill Form: Physical attack 
Description: Attacks an enemy with a Stone which inflicts 50 damage that will pierce enemy's defense and has a low chance of causing the Stun or Blind status.
Each cast requires 1 Stone.

MC_CARTREVOLUTION.name: Cart Revolution
MC_CARTREVOLUTION.description:
Skill Form: Physical attack 
Description: A splashed damage attack in which a Pushcart is smashed into a target.
Inflicts 150% of the damage of a normal attack in addition to extra damage from the weight of items in Pushcart.

MC_CHANGECART.name: Change Cart
MC_CHANGECART.description:
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Changes the Pushcart appearance. There are five different Pushcart styles that are chosen according to the character's Base Level.

MC_LOUD.name: Crazy Uproar
MC_LOUD.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Screams with battle vigor to add +4 STR for 5 minutes.

AL_HOLYLIGHT.name: Holy Light
AL_HOLYLIGHT.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Magical attack 
Element: Holy 
Description: Summons a holy light to counter evil.

MG_ENERGYCOAT.name: Energy Coat
MG_ENERGYCOAT.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Creates a barrier of spiritual energy that will buffer attacks at the caster. Caster's remaining SP affects the amount of damage reduced by the barrier. More SP is drained as attacks buffered by the barrier accumulate.

RG_SNATCHER.name: Snatcher
RG_SNATCHER.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Passive 
Description: Automatically steals item from monsters while attacking them.
The success rate of stealing items is affected by the skill level of the Thief skill, Steal.

RG_STEALCOIN.name: Steal Coin
RG_STEALCOIN.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Steals zeny from monsters. Its success rate rises as the skill evel is increased. Zeny can only be stolen once from each monster, and using this skill will draw the target monster's aggression.

RG_BACKSTAP.name: Back Stab
RG_BACKSTAP.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Physical attack 
Description: Back Stab is only usable when the caster is facing the enemy's rear. This skill never misses its target, but the target will face the user after it is hit.
When used with a Bow, this skill's damage is reduced by half. Back Stab can be used when in Hiding status, but it will cancel Hiding.

RG_TUNNELDRIVE.name: Tunnel Drive
RG_TUNNELDRIVE.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Passive 
Description: Enables movement while in Hiding status. Movement speed is slower than normal walk.

RG_RAID.name: Raid
RG_RAID.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Physical attack 
Description: Only usable while in Hiding status and will cancel Hiding once used.
This attack has a chance of causing Stun and Blind effects on targets within the skill's range. A sucessful hit will cause the enemy to receive 20% more damage for a certain number of hits. However, boss only get 10% more damage.

RG_STRIPWEAPON.name: Strip Weapon
RG_STRIPWEAPON.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Forcibly strips the Weapon off a target. In PVP, targeted character temporarily cannot re-equip Weapon.
On monsters, this skill will temporarily educe Attack Power by 25%. Skill level and caster's DEX affect chance of success.

RG_STRIPSHIELD.name: Strip Shield
RG_STRIPSHIELD.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Forcibly strips the Shield off a target. In PVP, targeted character temporarily cannot re-equip Shield.
On monsters, this skill will temporarily reduce Defense by 15%. Skill level and caster's DEX affect chance of success.

RG_STRIPARMOR.name: Strip Armor
RG_STRIPARMOR.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Forcibly strips the Armor off a target. In PVP, targeted character temporarily cannot re-equip Armor.
On monsters, this skill will temporarily reduce their VIT by 40%. Skill level and caster's DEX affect chance of success.

RG_STRIPHELM.name: Strip Helm
RG_STRIPHELM.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Forcibly strips the Helmet off a target. In PVP, targeted character temporarily cannot re-equip Helmet.
On monsters, this skill will temporarily reduce their INT by 40%. Skill level and caster's DEX affect chance of success.

RG_INTIMIDATE.name: Intimidate
RG_INTIMIDATE.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Strikes a target and forcibly teleport it with the caster to a random location on the same map.
This skill's success rate is affected by the level difference between caster and target. Boss monsters are unaffected by Intimidate.

RG_GRAFFITI.name: Graffiti
RG_GRAFFITI.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Scribbles graffiti around a targeted cell with a message of up to 20 characters. Graffiti cannot be overlapped or painted over before it disappears.
Requires 1 Red Gemstone.

RG_FLAGGRAFFITI.name: Flag Graffiti
RG_FLAGGRAFFITI.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Paints graffiti over a guild's flag which will be shown instead of the guild's emblem. This skill's level affects the amount of graffiti that can be painted.
Requires 1 Giant Paint Brush.

RG_CLEANER.name: Cleaner
RG_CLEANER.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Removes graffiti from a guild flag.
Requires 1 Wet Duster.

RG_GANGSTER.name: Gangster's Paradise
RG_GANGSTER.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Passive 
Description: When more than 2 Rogues sit beside each other, they will not be attacked by monsters with the exception of Bosses.

RG_COMPULSION.name: Compulsion Discount
RG_COMPULSION.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Passive 
Description: Purchases item from NPC shops at lower prices. 
[Level 1]: Discount Rate 9% 
[Level 2]: Discount Rate 13% 
[Level 3]: Discount Rate 17% 
[Level 4]: Discount Rate 21% 
[Level 5]: Discount Rate 25%

RG_PLAGIARISM.name: Plagiarism
RG_PLAGIARISM.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Passive 
Description: Enables the use of the last skill that was inflicted by an enemy.
This can only be used to remember character skills, and cannot enable the use of skills exclusive to monsters. Raising skill level will affect the level of skill that remembered.

AM_AXEMASTERY.name: Axe Mastery
AM_AXEMASTERY.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Passive 
Description: Increases damage inflicted with Axe class weapons. 
[Lv 1]: Damage +3 
[Lv 2]: Damage +6 
[Lv 3]: Damage +9 
[Lv 4]: Damage +12 
[Lv 5]: Damage +15 
[Lv 6]: Damage +18 
[Lv 7]: Damage +21 
[Lv 8]: Damage +24 
[Lv 9]: Damage +27 
[Lv 10]: Damage +30

AM_LEARNINGPOTION.name: Learning Potion
AM_LEARNINGPOTION.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Passive 
Description: Increases effectiveness of created potions, as well as increases potion creation success rate.

AM_PHARMACY.name: Pharmacy
AM_PHARMACY.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Enables manufacturing of potion and chemical. The correct Potion Creation Guide is needed for the manufacture of specific potions.
Consumes 1 Medicine Bowl.

AM_DEMONSTRATION.name: Demonstration
AM_DEMONSTRATION.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Physical attack 
Element: Fire 
Description: Targets an area and set it on fire by throwing a Bottle Grenade.
The flames will not push back enemies within their range, but they do have a chance of damaging the weapons of enemies.
Consumes 1 Bottle Grenade.

AM_ACIDTERROR.name: Acid Terror
AM_ACIDTERROR.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Physical attack 
Description: Flings a bottle of acid at an enemy that has the chance of damaging the target's armor or causing the Bleeding effect.
Consumes 1 Acid Bottle.

AM_POTIONPITCHER.name: Potion Pitcher
AM_POTIONPITCHER.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Throws a potion to an ally that will immediately take effect. Skill level determines the type of potion thrown, so increasing this skill's level makes more kinds of potions usable with this skill. 
[Lv 1]: Red Potion 
[Lv 2]: Orange Potion 
[Lv 3]: Yellow Potion 
[Lv 4]: White Potion 
[Lv 5]: Blue Potion

AM_CANNIBALIZE.name: Bio Cannibalize
AM_CANNIBALIZE.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Summons a Plant monster to a targeted cell. Monster will disappear after the skill's duration.
Skill level affects the type of Plant monster that is summoned, as well as the monster's MaxHP. Caster can only summon monsters of the same type at once.
Consumes 1 Plant Bottle. 
[Lv 1]: Summon up to 5 Mandragora 
[Lv 2]: Summon up to 4 Hydra 
[Lv 3]: Summon up to 3 Flora 
[Lv 4]: Summon up to 2 Parasite 
[Lv 5]: Summon up to 1 Geographer

AM_SPHEREMINE.name: Sphere Mine
AM_SPHEREMINE.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Summons a Marine Sphere to a targeted cell. Marine Spheres will cast Self-Destruct upon receiving damage.
Consumes 1 Marine Sphere Bottle.

AM_CP_WEAPON.name: Chemical Protection Weapon
AM_CP_WEAPON.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Protects a targeted ally's Weapon from damage in battle for a set duration.
Each cast requires 1 Glistening Coat.

AM_CP_SHIELD.name: Chemical Protection Shield
AM_CP_SHIELD.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Protects a targeted ally's Shield from damage in battle for a set duration.
Each cast requires 1 Glistening Coat.

AM_CP_ARMOR.name: Chemical Protection Armor
AM_CP_ARMOR.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Protects a targeted ally's Armor from damage in battle for a set duration.
Each cast requires 1 Glistening Coat.

AM_CP_HELM.name: Chemical Protection Helm
AM_CP_HELM.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Protects a targeted ally's Headgear from damage in battle for a set duration.
Each cast requires 1 Glistening Coat.

AM_BIOETHICS.name: Bioethics
AM_BIOETHICS.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Passive 
Description: A skill that is fundamental in enabling the creation of Homunculus.

AM_BIOTECHNOLOGY.name: Biotechnology
AM_BIOTECHNOLOGY.description:
Skill Form: Passive 
Description: Researches biotechnology in order to increase Homunculus creation success rate and Homunculus's MaxHP.

AM_CREATECREATURE.name: Create Creature
AM_CREATECREATURE.description:
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Creates an embryo. Skill level affects success chance.
Ingredients for making an embryo:
- Glass Tube, Morning Dew of Yggdrasil, Seed of Life, 1 each.
- Requires the Potion Creation Guide present in your inventory.

AM_CULTIVATION.name: Cultivation
AM_CULTIVATION.description:
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Developes an Embryo so that it grows into a Homunculus. Skill level affects the chance of success.
Cultivation cannot be used when the caster already has a Homunculus present.

AM_FLAMECONTROL.name: Flame Control
AM_FLAMECONTROL.description:
Skill Form: Passive 
Description: Increases the chance of success when using the Cultivation skill, as well as resistance to the Fire elemental attacks.

AM_CALLHOMUN.name: Call Homunculus
AM_CALLHOMUN.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Summons an existing Homunculus that was stored by using the Rest skill.
Consumes 1 Embryo.

AM_REST.name: Rest
AM_REST.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Vaporizes Homunculus into a form that is much easier to carry around. This skill is only usable if Homunculus has at least 80% of its MaxHP.
Vaporized Homunculus can be restored with the Call Homunculus skill.

AM_DRILLMASTER.name: Drillmaster
AM_DRILLMASTER.description:
Skill Form: Passive 
Description: Raises Attack Power of Homunculus. 
[Lv 1]: Damage +3 
[Lv 2]: Damage +6 
[Lv 3]: Damage +9 
[Lv 4]: Damage +12 
[Lv 5]: Damage +15 
[Lv 6]: Damage +18 
[Lv 7]: Damage +21 
[Lv 8]: Damage +24 
[Lv 9]: Damage +27 
[Lv 10]: Damage +30

AM_HEALHOMUN.name: Heal Homunculus
AM_HEALHOMUN.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active 
Description:  This skill has been dropped by Gravity. 
 Casts heal on Homunculus. Skill power is that of an Acolyte's Heal.

AM_RESURRECTHOMUN.name: Resurrect Homunculus
AM_RESURRECTHOMUN.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Resurrect a killed Homunculus.

CR_TRUST.name: Faith
CR_TRUST.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Passive 
Description: Increases MaxHP and resistance against Holy elemental attacks.

CR_AUTOGUARD.name: Auto Guard
CR_AUTOGUARD.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Activates Auto Guard status which has a chance of blocking long and short range physical attacks for skill duration.
When this skill blocks an attack, caster is immobilized for 0.3 seconds but this time can be reduced by increasing the skill's level. Casting this skill again cancels Guard status.
Requires Shield.

CR_SHIELDCHARGE.name: Shield Charge
CR_SHIELDCHARGE.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Physical attack 
Description: Smashes a Shield into an enemy, pushing it a few cells backward with a chance of causing Stun status.
Requires Shield.

CR_SHIELDBOOMERANG.name: Shield Boomerang
CR_SHIELDBOOMERANG.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Physical attack 
Description: Attacks an enemy from a distance by throwing a Shield.
The Shield's weight and refine level affect the amount of damage that is inflicted.
Requires Shield.

CR_REFLECTSHIELD.name: Reflect Shield
CR_REFLECTSHIELD.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Reflects a certain amount of damage back to the enemy after they inflict damage with melee physical attack.
Requires Shield.

CR_HOLYCROSS.name: Holy Cross
CR_HOLYCROSS.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Physical attack 
Element: Holy 
Description: Attacks an enemy with a double hit Holy attack that has the chance of causing the Blind status.

CR_GRANDCROSS.name: Grand Cross
CR_GRANDCROSS.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Physical attack 
Element: Holy 
Description: Summons a cross of holy light on the ground around the caster that will damage enemies that come into contact with it. Grand Cross will cause the Blind effect on Undead and Demon monster aside from Boss monster.
When casted, Grand Cross will drain 20% of caster's remaining HP and inflict additional damage after Grand Cross is summoned.

CR_DEVOTION.name: Devotion
CR_DEVOTION.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Protects a party member by receiving all damage intended for targeted ally. Devotion only works when level difference between caster and party member is less than 10.
The skill's effect is canceled when the party member moves out of the skill's range or dies.
Cannot be used for other Crusader class.

CR_PROVIDENCE.name: Providence
CR_PROVIDENCE.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Temporarily increases party member's resistance to Demon and Holy elemental monsters.

CR_DEFENDER.name: Defender
CR_DEFENDER.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Reduces damage taken from long ranged physical attacks at the cost of decreasing ASPD and movement speeds for the skill's duration. Casting this skill again cancels the Defender status.
Requires Shield.

CR_SPEARQUICKEN.name: Spear Quicken
CR_SPEARQUICKEN.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Increases attack speed when using spear weapon for skill duration.

MO_IRONHAND.name: Iron Hand
MO_IRONHAND.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Passive 
Description: Increases damage with bare hands and Knuckle class weapons. 
[Lv 1]: Damage +3 
[Lv 2]: Damage +6 
[Lv 3]: Damage +9 
[Lv 4]: Damage +12 
[Lv 5]: Damage +15 
[Lv 6]: Damage +18 
[Lv 7]: Damage +21 
[Lv 8]: Damage +24 
[Lv 9]: Damage +27 
[Lv 10]: Damage +30

MO_SPIRITSRECOVERY.name: Spirits Recovery
MO_SPIRITSRECOVERY.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Passive 
Description: Restores additional HP and SP every 10 sec while sitting. If user's carried weight is over 50% of the maximum capacity, this extra HP and SP is recovered every 20 sec.

MO_CALLSPIRITS.name: Call Spirits
MO_CALLSPIRITS.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Summons a Spirit Sphere, which can be used to amplify different skill abilities. Each spirit sphere adds 3 ATK.

MO_ABSORBSPIRITS.name: Absorb Spirits
MO_ABSORBSPIRITS.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Absorbs certain amount of SP from a Spirit Sphere, which can be stolen from other Monks during PvP and WoE.
When used on monsters, this skill has a 20% chance to give the caster an amount of SP that is determined by the level of the targeted monster.
Ineffective against Boss monsters and WoE guardians.

MO_TRIPLEATTACK.name: Triple Attack
MO_TRIPLEATTACK.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Passive 
Description: Enables the chance of automatically delivering a triple attack in battle. This skill can be followed up with Chain Combo.

MO_BODYRELOCATION.name: Body Relocation
MO_BODYRELOCATION.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Instantly teleport to a targeted spot if there are no obstacles between the caster and destination.
Each cast requires 1 Spirit Sphere when not in Explosion Spirits status.

MO_DODGE.name: Dodge
MO_DODGE.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Passive 
Description: Increases flee rate.

MO_INVESTIGATE.name: Investigate
MO_INVESTIGATE.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Physical attack 
Description: Attacks an enemy with a massive psychic impact that will inflict more damage when the enemy has high Defense.
Each cast requires 1 Spirit Sphere.

MO_FINGEROFFENSIVE.name: Finger Offensive
MO_FINGEROFFENSIVE.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Physical attack 
Description: Attacks a distant enemy by firing Spirit Sphere(s).
Each cast requires at least 1 Spirit Sphere.

MO_STEELBODY.name: Steel Body
MO_STEELBODY.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Temporarily enhance caster's Defense and Magic Defense while decreasing Movement and Attack Speed.
While this skill is active, other skills cannot be used.
Each cast requires 5 Spirit Spheres.

MO_BLADESTOP.name: Blade Stop
MO_BLADESTOP.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Immobilizes both the caster and an enemy until either one of them dies. Increasing this skill allows the use of other skills during the Blade Stop status. Ineffective against Boss monsters.
Each cast requires 1 Spirit Sphere. 
Duration and Skills Enabled in Blade Stop Status according to skill level:
[Lv 1]: 20 sec 
[Lv 2]: 30 sec, Finger Offensive enabled 
[Lv 3]: 40 sec, Investigate enabled 
[Lv 4]: 50 sec, Chain Combo enabled 
[Lv 5]: 60 sec, Asura Strike enabled;
Caster must be in Explosion Spirits state and have at least 4 Spirit Spheres to use Asura Strike.

MO_EXPLOSIONSPIRITS.name: Critical Explosion
MO_EXPLOSIONSPIRITS.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Temporarily increases caster's Critical Attack rate for period of time. During the Explosion Spirits tatus, SP regen is reduced by 50%.
Each cast requires 5 Spirit Spheres.

MO_EXTREMITYFIST.name: Asura Strike
MO_EXTREMITYFIST.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Physical attack 
Description: Only usable during Critical Explosion status. Inflict devastating damage by consuming the caster's remaining SP. After using Asura Strike, the Explosion Spirits status is
automatically canceled and will not able to restore SP for 10 seconds.
Each cast requires 5 Spirit Spheres.

MO_CHAINCOMBO.name: Chain Combo
MO_CHAINCOMBO.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Physical attack 
Description: Only usable during Triple Attack delay. Spins a target while attacking the enemy with a combo hit.
This skill can be followed up with Combo Finish.

MO_COMBOFINISH.name: Combo Finish
MO_COMBOFINISH.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Physical attack 
Description: Only usable during Chain Combo delay. This skill can be followed up with the Asura Strike skill if the user is in Explosion Spirits state and has summoned at least 4 Spirit Spheres.
Each cast requires 1 Spirit Sphere.

SA_ADVANCEDBOOK.name: Advanced Book
SA_ADVANCEDBOOK.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Passive 
Description: Increases Attack Speed and damage with Book class weapons. 
[Lv 1]: Damage +3, After attack delay -0.5% 
[Lv 2]: Damage +6, After attack delay -1% 
[Lv 3]: Damage +9, After attack delay -1.5% 
[Lv 4]: Damage +12, After attack delay -2% 
[Lv 5]: Damage +15, After attack delay -2.5% 
[Lv 6]: Damage +18, After attack delay -3% 
[Lv 7]: Damage +21, After attack delay -3.5% 
[Lv 8]: Damage +24, After attack delay -4% 
[Lv 9]: Damage +27, After attack delay -4.5% 
[Lv 10]: Damage +30, After attack delay -5%

SA_CASTCANCEL.name: Cast Cancel
SA_CASTCANCEL.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Only usable while casting a magic spell. Immediately cancel a spell, allowing the caster to take another action without any delay.

SA_MAGICROD.name: Magic Rod
SA_MAGICROD.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Upon being attacked with a skill, using Magic Rod has a chance of giving the SP that the enemy has used for the skill to the caster instead of damage.
Countering Spell Breaker with Magic Rod will reduce the target's SP by 20% when it is successful.

SA_SPELLBREAKER.name: Spell Breaker
SA_SPELLBREAKER.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Interrupts a magic spell cast by an enemy and receive the SP the enemy used to cast that spell, as well as reduce 2% of the enemy's HP.
At skill 5 and above, half of this HP damage is absorbed by the caster.
HP cannot be drained from Boss monsters and WoE Guardians, but this skill does have 10% chance of interrupting Boss monster spells.

SA_FREECAST.name: Free Cast
SA_FREECAST.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Passive 
Description: Allows movement and attack while casting spells. 
[Lv 1]: 30% Move Speed/55% damage Speed 
[Lv 2]: 35% Move Speed/60% damage Speed 
[Lv 3]: 40% Move Speed/65% damage Speed 
[Lv 4]: 45% Move Speed/70% damage Speed 
[Lv 5]: 50% Move Speed/75% damage Speed 
[Lv 6]: 55% Move Speed/80% damage Speed 
[Lv 7]: 60% Move Speed/85% damage Speed 
[Lv 8]: 65% Move Speed/90% damage Speed 
[Lv 9]: 70% Move Speed/95% damage Speed 
[Lv 10]: 75% Move Speed/100% damage Speed

SA_AUTOSPELL.name: Auto Spell
SA_AUTOSPELL.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Autocasts certain magic spells by a certain chance while attacking enemies with physical attack.
Spells that are auto cast through Auto Spell only consume 2/3 of the required SP. Spells that are not learned by the caster can't be cast. 
[Lv 2]: Level 1 Cold, Fire or Lightning Bolt 
[Lv 3]: Level 2 Cold, Fire or Lightning Bolt 
[Lv 4]: Level 3 Cold, Fire or Lightning Bolt 
[Lv 5]: Level 1 Soul Strike 
[Lv 6]: Level 2 Soul Strike 
[Lv 7]: Level 3 Soul Strike 
[Lv 8]: Level 1 Fire Ball 
[Lv 9]: Level 2 Fire Ball 
[Lv 10]: Level 1 Frost Diver 
The level of the skill cast by Auto Spell is randomly determined and limited to the highest level learned by the caster.

SA_FLAMELAUNCHER.name: Flare Launcher
SA_FLAMELAUNCHER.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Endows a party member's weapon with Fire elemental for the skill's duration. If the skill fails, the weapon being endowed will be destroyed.
Consumes 1 Red Blood.

SA_FROSTWEAPON.name: Frost Weapon
SA_FROSTWEAPON.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Endows a party member's weapon with Water elemental for the skill's duration. If the skill fails, the weapon being endowed will be destroyed.
Consumes 1 Crystal Blue.

SA_LIGHTNINGLOADER.name: Lightning Loader
SA_LIGHTNINGLOADER.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Endows a party member's weapon with Wind elemental for the skill's duration. If the skill fails, the weapon being endowed will be destroyed.
Consumes 1 Wind of Verdure.

SA_SEISMICWEAPON.name: Seismic Weapon
SA_SEISMICWEAPON.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Endows a party member's weapon with Earth elemental for the skill's duration. If the skill fails, the weapon being endowed will be destroyed.
Consumes 1 Green Live.

SA_DRAGONOLOGY.name: Dragonology
SA_DRAGONOLOGY.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Passive 
Description: Increases resistance and damage against Dragon monsters. Mastering this skill will add +3 INT.

SA_VOLCANO.name: Volcano
SA_VOLCANO.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active, Area Enchantment 
Description: Enchants an area on the ground so that it will amplify all Fire elemental attacks, as well as the Fire elemental targets Attack Power, in its range.
Ice Wall and Sage skills that target the ground can't be cast over Volcano.
Initial cast requires 1 Yellow Gemstone, but multiple casting of this skill will not consume Gemstones throughout Volcano's active duration.

SA_DELUGE.name: Deluge
SA_DELUGE.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active, Area Enchantment 
Description: Enchants an area on the ground so that it will amplify all Water elemental attacks and the MaxHP of Water elemental targets in its range.
This area will also enable the use of Water Ball and Aqua Benedicta.
Other Sage skills that target the ground can't be cast over Deluge.
Initial cast requires 1 Yellow Gemstone, but multiple casting of this skill will not consume Gemstones throughout Deluge's active duration.

SA_VIOLENTGALE.name: Violent Gale
SA_VIOLENTGALE.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active, Area Enchantment 
Description: Enchants an area on the ground so that it will amplify all Wind attacks and the Flee Rate of Wind element targets in its range.
This area will also increase the duration of Fire Wall so that it lasts 1.5 times longer.
Other Sage skills that target the ground can't be cast over Violent Gale.
Initial cast requires 1 Yellow Gemstone, but multiple casting of this skill will not consume Gemstones throughout Violent Gale's active duration.

SA_LANDPROTECTOR.name: Land Protector
SA_LANDPROTECTOR.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active, Area Enchantment 
Description: Casts a spell that will block or cancel all ground targeting spells or enchantments.
Other Sage skills that target the ground can't be cast in the area enchanted by Land Protector.
Each cast requires 1 Blue Gemstone and 1 Yellow Gemstone.

SA_DISPELL.name: Dispell
SA_DISPELL.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Casting Dispell has a chance of canceling all magic effects that have been cast on a target.
Each cast requires 1 Yellow Gemstone.

SA_ABRACADABRA.name: Abracadabra
SA_ABRACADABRA.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Random 
Description: Casts a random skill. Leveling this skill increases the variety of skills that are cast through Abracadabra.
Each cast requires 2 Yellow Gemstones.

SA_MONOCELL.name: Monocell
SA_MONOCELL.description:
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Transmogrify a target into a Poring for the skill's duration. This skill is exclusively cast through Abracadabra.

SA_CLASSCHANGE.name: Class Change
SA_CLASSCHANGE.description:
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Transmogrify a target into a Boss monster for the skill's duration. This skill is exclusively cast through Abracadabra.

SA_SUMMONMONSTER.name: Summon Monster
SA_SUMMONMONSTER.description:
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Summons a random monster, as per Dead Branch. This skill is exclusively cast through Abracadabra.

SA_REVERSEORCISH.name: Reverse Orcish
SA_REVERSEORCISH.description:
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Changes head of another player to that of an Orc. This skill is exclusively cast through Abracadabra.

SA_DEATH.name: Death
SA_DEATH.description:
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Kill enemy instantly, with no item drop or experience gain. Success chance based on skill level. This skill is exclusively cast through Abracadabra.

SA_FORTUNE.name: Fortune
SA_FORTUNE.description:
Skill Form: Active 
Description: It gets the LV of the Target * the Zeny as of 100. This skill is exclusively cast through Abracadabra.

SA_TAMINGMONSTER.name: Taming Monster
SA_TAMINGMONSTER.description:
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Tame monster as if a taming item was used on it. This skill is exclusively cast through Abracadabra.

SA_QUESTION.name: Question
SA_QUESTION.description:
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Create a ? emote above monster's head. This skill is exclusively cast through Abracadabra.

SA_GRAVITY.name: Gravity
SA_GRAVITY.description:
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Create a Drop Emote above caster's head. This skill is exclusively cast through Abracadabra.

SA_LEVELUP.name: Level Up
SA_LEVELUP.description:
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Gain a level. This skill is exclusively cast through Abracadabra.

SA_INSTANTDEATH.name: Instant Death
SA_INSTANTDEATH.description:
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Commit suicide. Experience is lost as normal. This skill is exclusively cast through Abracadabra.

SA_FULLRECOVERY.name: Full Recovery
SA_FULLRECOVERY.description:
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Recover all HP and SP, and stop any abnormal status effects. This skill is exclusively cast through Abracadabra.

SA_COMA.name: Coma
SA_COMA.description:
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Drop to 1 HP and SP. This skill is exclusively cast through Abracadabra.

BD_ADAPTATION.name: Adaptation to Circumstances
BD_ADAPTATION.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Cancels a current song or dance. The same song may not be performed again immediately.

BD_ENCORE.name: Encore
BD_ENCORE.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Performs the last song or dance again at half SP cost.

BD_LULLABY.name: Lullaby
BD_LULLABY.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Ensemble 
Description: Casts sleep on all enemies within area of effect. Effect will occur every 6 seconds for 60 seconds (11 times) and is affected by Int of the caster, but it has a chance to fail depending on resistances. Cannot be canceled by Dispell.

BD_RICHMANKIM.name: Mr. Kim A Rich Man
BD_RICHMANKIM.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Ensemble 
Description: Increases gained exp from mobs killed within the area of effect by (125+11*SkillLV)%. Cannot be canceled by Dispell. 
[Lv 1]: +136% Experience Rate 
[Lv 2]: +147% Experience Rate 
[Lv 3]: +158% Experience Rate 
[Lv 4]: +169% Experience Rate 
[Lv 5]: +180% Experience Rate

BD_ETERNALCHAOS.name: Eternal Chaos
BD_ETERNALCHAOS.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Ensemble 
Description: Reduces the Def of enemies to 0 within the area of effect. Cannot be canceled by Dispell.

BD_DRUMBATTLEFIELD.name: A Drum on the Battlefield
BD_DRUMBATTLEFIELD.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Ensemble 
Description: Increase Atk by 25+25*SkillLV and Def by 2+2*SkillLV of all party members within area of effect. Cannot be canceled by Dispell. 
[Lv 1]: +50 Atk, +4 Def 
[Lv 2]: +75 Atk, +6 Def 
[Lv 3]: +100 Atk, +8 Def 
[Lv 4]: +125 Atk, +10 Def 
[Lv 5]: +150 Atk, +12 Def

BD_RINGNIBELUNGEN.name: The Ring of Nibelungen
BD_RINGNIBELUNGEN.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Ensemble 
Description: Increases damage of all Level 4 Weapons within area of effect by Def-ignoring +50+25*SkillLV. Cannot be canceled by Dispell. 
[Lv 1]: +75 Damage 
[Lv 2]: +100 Damage 
[Lv 3]: +125 Damage 
[Lv 4]: +150 Damage 
[Lv 5]: +175 Damage

BD_ROKISWEIL.name: Loki's Veil
BD_ROKISWEIL.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Ensemble 
Description: Blocks all skill use for everything (including players) within area of effect. Can not be canceled by Dispell. Does not work against Boss monsters.

BD_INTOABYSS.name: Into the Abyss
BD_INTOABYSS.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Ensemble 
Description: All party members within the area of effect are able to cast spells without gemstones and lay traps without using an item. Cannot be canceled by Dispell.

BD_SIEGFRIED.name: Invulnerable Siegfried
BD_SIEGFRIED.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Ensemble 
Description: Increases resistance against elemental attacks and status ailments for all players in area of effect. Cannot be canceled by Dispell. 
[Lv 1]: Elemental 60%, Ailments 10% 
[Lv 2]: Elemental 65%, Ailments 20% 
[Lv 3]: Elemental 70%, Ailments 30% 
[Lv 4]: Elemental 75%, Ailments 40%

BD_RAGNAROK.name: Ragnarok
BD_RAGNAROK.description:
This skill has been dropped by Gravity. 
No info, supposed to cast random area skill and affect players and monsters alike.

BA_MUSICALLESSON.name: Musical Lesson
BA_MUSICALLESSON.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Passive 
Description: Raises Attack Power of instruments by 3 per SkillLV, and increases effects of songs. This skill also partially counters the walking speed reduction while performing. 
[Lv 1]: Damage +3 
[Lv 2]: Damage +6 
[Lv 3]: Damage +9 
[Lv 4]: Damage +12 
[Lv 5]: Damage +15 
[Lv 6]: Damage +18 
[Lv 7]: Damage +21 
[Lv 8]: Damage +24 
[Lv 9]: Damage +27 
[Lv 10]: Damage +30

BA_MUSICALSTRIKE.name: Musical Strike
BA_MUSICALSTRIKE.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Physical attack 
Description: Fires a powerful arrow at the enemy, and may be used during songs. Element type of attack is dependent on equipped arrows. Atk increase is (125+25*SkillLV)%. 
[Lv 1]: +150% damage 
[Lv 2]: +175% damage 
[Lv 3]: +200% damage 
[Lv 4]: +225% damage 
[Lv 5]: +250% damage

BA_DISSONANCE.name: Dissonance
BA_DISSONANCE.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Physical attack 
Description: Hits enemies in area with a slow sonic attack, piercing their defense. Deals 30+10*SkillLV damage every 3 seconds for 30 seconds (11 attacks). Also occurs where two Bard songs overlap. 
[Lv 1]: 40 Atk 
[Lv 2]: 50 Atk 
[Lv 3]: 60 Atk 
[Lv 4]: 70 Atk 
[Lv 5]: 80 Atk

BA_FROSTJOKE.name: Frost Joker
BA_FROSTJOKE.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Causes frozen status on everything (including players) within the area of effect. In PvP or Guild siege area, this skill works on caster as well. Freezing chance (15+5*SkillLV)%. 
[Lv 1]: 20% Chance to Freeze 
[Lv 2]: 25% Chance to Freeze 
[Lv 3]: 30% Chance to Freeze 
[Lv 4]: 35% Chance to Freeze 
[Lv 5]: 40% Chance to Freeze

BA_WHISTLE.name: A Whistle
BA_WHISTLE.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Raises Flee Rate by SkillLV and Perfect Dodge by SkillLV/2 rounded down of all players in the area of effect.
The Flee Rate is affected by Agi, and Musical Lesson skill of the caster. The Perfect Dodge rate is affected by Luk, and Musical Lesson of the caster. 
[Lv 1]: +1 Flee Rate & 1 Perfect Dodge 
[Lv 2]: +2 Flee Rate & 1 Perfect Dodge 
[Lv 3]: +3 Flee Rate & 2 Perfect Dodge 
[Lv 4]: +4 Flee Rate & 2 Perfect Dodge 
[Lv 5]: +5 Flee Rate & 3 Perfect Dodge 
[Lv 6]: +6 Flee Rate & 3 Perfect Dodge 
[Lv 7]: +7 Flee Rate & 4 Perfect Dodge 
[Lv 8]: +8 Flee Rate & 4 Perfect Dodge 
[Lv 9]: +9 Flee Rate & 5 Perfect Dodge 
[Lv 10]: +10 Flee Rate & 5 Perfect Dodge

BA_ASSASSINCROSS.name: Assassin Cross of Sunset
BA_ASSASSINCROSS.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Increases attack rate of all players in the area of effect by (10+SkillLV)%. Stacks with Speed Potions but not with Adrenaline Rush or Weapon Quicken. 
[Lv 1]: +11% ASPD 
[Lv 2]: +12% ASPD 
[Lv 3]: +13% ASPD 
[Lv 4]: +14% ASPD 
[Lv 5]: +15% ASPD
