[Lv 9]: +19% ASPD 
[Lv 10]: +20% ASPD

BA_POEMBRAGI.name: A Poem of Bragi
BA_POEMBRAGI.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Reduces casting time by 3% per SkillLV and Cool Down by 5% per SkillLV (on LV10 - 50%) of all spells used in the area of effect.
The amount of casting time reduced by this skill is affected by Dex and Musical Lesson skill level of the caster. The amount of delay after skill use is affected by Int and Musical Lesson skill level of the caster. Suffragium, the Priest skill, doesn't associate in this skill. 
[Lv 1]: 3% Faster Cast & 3% Less Delay 
[Lv 2]: 6% Faster Cast & 6% Less Delay 
[Lv 3]: 9% Faster Cast & 9% Less Delay 
[Lv 4]: 12% Faster Cast & 12% Less Delay 
[Lv 5]: 15% Faster Cast & 15% Less Delay 
[Lv 6]: 18% Faster Cast & 18% Less Delay 
[Lv 7]: 21% Faster Cast & 21% Less Delay 
[Lv 8]: 24% Faster Cast & 24% Less Delay 
[Lv 9]: 27% Faster Cast & 27% Less Delay 
[Lv 10]: 30% Faster Cast & 50% Less Delay

BA_APPLEIDUN.name: The Apple of Idun
BA_APPLEIDUN.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Increases Maximum HP of all players in the area by (5+2*SkillLV)%. Also creates a healing zone, restoring 30+5*SkillLV HP every 6 seconds in the area of effect for up to 3 minutes (31 times total). 
[Lv 1]: + 7% Maximum HP & Heals 35HP 
[Lv 2]: + 9% Maximum HP & Heals 40HP 
[Lv 3]: + 11% Maximum HP & Heals 45HP 
[Lv 4]: + 13% Maximum HP & Heals 50HP 
[Lv 5]: + 15% Maximum HP & Heals 55HP 
[Lv 6]: + 17% Maximum HP & Heals 60HP 
[Lv 7]: + 19% Maximum HP & Heals 65HP 
[Lv 8]: + 21% Maximum HP & Heals 70HP 
[Lv 9]: + 23% Maximum HP & Heals 75HP 
[Lv 10]: + 25% Maximum HP & Heals 80HP

DC_DANCINGLESSON.name: Dancing Lesson
DC_DANCINGLESSON.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Passive 
Description: Increases whip type weapon damage and effectiveness of dancing skills by 3 per SkillLV. This skill also partially counters the walking speed reduction while performing. 
[Lv 1]: Damage +3 
[Lv 2]: Damage +6 
[Lv 3]: Damage +9 
[Lv 4]: Damage +12 
[Lv 5]: Damage +15 
[Lv 6]: Damage +18 
[Lv 7]: Damage +21 
[Lv 8]: Damage +24 
[Lv 9]: Damage +27 
[Lv 10]: Damage +30

DC_THROWARROW.name: Throw Arrow
DC_THROWARROW.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Physical attack 
Description: Allows the dancer to throw an arrow with her whip as if she were firing it from a bow. May use other dancing skills in conjunction with this skill. The element of the attack depends on the equipped arrows. Atk increase is (125+25*SkillLV)%. 
[Lv 1]: +150% damage 
[Lv 2]: +175% damage 
[Lv 3]: +200% damage 
[Lv 4]: +225% damage 
[Lv 5]: +250% damage

DC_UGLYDANCE.name: Ugly Dance
DC_UGLYDANCE.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Drains SP from enemies in the area of effect. Drains 5+5*SkillLV SP every 3 seconds (11 times total). Also occurs where two Dances overlap. 
[Lv 1]: Drains 10 SP per 3 sec 
[Lv 2]: Drains 15 SP per 3 sec 
[Lv 3]: Drains 20 SP per 3 sec 
[Lv 4]: Drains 25 SP per 3 sec 
[Lv 5]: Drains 30 SP per 3 sec

DC_SCREAM.name: Scream
DC_SCREAM.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Inflicts everything (including players) with stun within area of effect. In PvP or Guild siege area, this skill works on caster as well. Stun chance is (25+5*SkillLV)% and the duration is 5 seconds. 
[Lv 1]: 30% Chance to Stun 
[Lv 2]: 35% Chance to Stun 
[Lv 3]: 40% Chance to Stun 
[Lv 4]: 45% Chance to Stun 
[Lv 5]: 50% Chance to Stun

DC_HUMMING.name: Humming
DC_HUMMING.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Increase Hit of players in the area of effect by +2 per SkillLV.
The accuracy rate increased by this skill is affected by Dancing Lesson skill level and Dex of the caster. 
[Lv 1]: +2 Hit 
[Lv 2]: +4 Hit 
[Lv 3]: +6 Hit 
[Lv 4]: +8 Hit 
[Lv 5]: +10 Hit 
[Lv 6]: +12 Hit 
[Lv 7]: +14 Hit 
[Lv 8]: +16 Hit 
[Lv 9]: +18 Hit 
[Lv 10]: +20 Hit

DC_DONTFORGETME.name: Please Don't Forget Me
DC_DONTFORGETME.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Decreases ASPD by 3% per SkillLV and Movement rate by 2% per SkillLV of all enemies in the area of effect.
Cancels any skills that increase movement or ASPD. The amount of ASPD decreased by this skill is affected by Dancing Lesson skill level and Str of the caster.
The amount of moving speed decreased by this skill is affected by Dancing Lesson skill level and Agi of the caster. 
[Lv 1]: -2% Move SPD & -3% Attack SPD 
[Lv 2]: -4% Move SPD & -6% Attack SPD 
[Lv 3]: -6% Move SPD & -9% Attack SPD 
[Lv 4]: -8% Move SPD & -12% Attack SPD 
[Lv 5]: -10% Move SPD & -15% Attack SPD 
[Lv 6]: -12% Move SPD & -18% Attack SPD 
[Lv 7]: -14% Move SPD & -21% Attack SPD 
[Lv 8]: -16% Move SPD & -24% Attack SPD 
[Lv 9]: -18% Move SPD & -27% Attack SPD 
[Lv 10]: -20% Move SPD & -30% Attack SPD

DC_FORTUNEKISS.name: Fortune's Kiss
DC_FORTUNEKISS.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Increases Critical Rate of all players in the area of effect by 1% per SkillLV.
The amount of Critical Rate increased by this skill is affected by Dancing Lesson skill level and Luk of the caster. 
[Lv 1]: +1% Critical Rate 
[Lv 2]: +2% Critical Rate 
[Lv 3]: +3% Critical Rate 
[Lv 4]: +4% Critical Rate 
[Lv 5]: +5% Critical Rate 
[Lv 6]: +6% Critical Rate 
[Lv 7]: +7% Critical Rate 
[Lv 8]: +8% Critical Rate 
[Lv 9]: +9% Critical Rate 
[Lv 10]: +10% Critical Rate

DC_SERVICEFORYOU.name: Service for You
DC_SERVICEFORYOU.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Increase Maximum SP of all players in the area of effect by (15+SkillLV)%. Reduces consumption of all skills within area of effect by (20+3*SkillLV)%.
The amount of Maximum SP increased by this skill is affected by Dancing Lesson skill and Int of the caster.
The amount of SP consumption reduced by this skill is affected by Dancing Lesson skill and Int of the caster. 
[Lv 1]: + 16% Maximum SP & 23% Less SP Usage 
[Lv 2]: + 17% Maximum SP & 26% Less SP Usage 
[Lv 3]: + 18% Maximum SP & 29% Less SP Usage 
[Lv 4]: + 19% Maximum SP & 32% Less SP Usage 
[Lv 5]: + 20% Maximum SP & 35% Less SP Usage 
[Lv 6]: + 21% Maximum SP & 38% Less SP Usage 
[Lv 7]: + 22% Maximum SP & 41% Less SP Usage 
[Lv 8]: + 23% Maximum SP & 44% Less SP Usage 
[Lv 9]: + 24% Maximum SP & 47% Less SP Usage 
[Lv 10]: + 25% Maximum SP & 50% Less SP Usage

WE_MALE.name: I'll save you
WE_MALE.description:
Skill Form: Wedding Skill 
Restores HP of one's partner by consuming 10% of one's total HP amount.
Partner must have at least 10% of his HP in order to cast this skill.

WE_FEMALE.name: I'll sacrifice myself for you
WE_FEMALE.description:
Skill Form: Wedding Skill 
Restores SP of one's partner by consuming 10% of one's total SP amount.
Partner must have at least 10% of his SP in order to cast this skill.

WE_CALLPARTNER.name: I miss you
WE_CALLPARTNER.description:
Skill Form: Wedding Skill 
Summons one's marital partner to caster's location.
Both partners must equip their Wedding Rings to activate this skill.
It might not be possible to use this skill in some places such as Guild Siege maps.

ITM_TOMAHAWK.name: Throw Tomahawk
ITM_TOMAHAWK.description: Description: Enable use of the Skill Throw Tomahawk.

LK_AURABLADE.name: Aura Blade
LK_AURABLADE.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Enchants equipped weapon with an aura that will grant additional damage that is unaffected by the caster's Accuracy Rate or the enemy's Defense. 
[Lv 1]: Damage +20 
[Lv 2]: Damage +40 
[Lv 3]: Damage +60 
[Lv 4]: Damage +80 
[Lv 5]: Damage +100

LK_PARRYING.name: Parry
LK_PARRYING.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Block damage from physical ttack using Two Handed Sword. When successful block an attack, caster will be forced to pause momentarily.
Requires Two Handed Sword.
[Lv 1]: 5% block chance 
[Lv 2]: 10% block chance 
[Lv 3]: 15% block chance 
[Lv 4]: 20% block chance 
[Lv 5]: 25% block chance 
[Lv 6]: 30% block chance 
[Lv 7]: 35% block chance 
[Lv 8]: 40% block chance 
[Lv 9]: 45% block chance 
[Lv 10]: 50% block chance

LK_CONCENTRATION.name: Concentration
LK_CONCENTRATION.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: When activated, this skill endows the caster with the Endure effect and increased Attack Power and Accuracy, but will also temporarily reduce Defense. 
[Lv 1]: Hit +10, Atk +5%, Def -5% 
[Lv 2]: Hit +20, Atk +10%, Def -10% 
[Lv 3]: Hit +30, Atk +15%, Def -15% 
[Lv 4]: Hit +40, Atk +20%, Def -20% 
[Lv 5]: Hit +50, Atk +25%, Def -25%

LK_TENSIONRELAX.name: Tension Relax
LK_TENSIONRELAX.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Triples your HP recovery speed when sitting. This skill cancels out immediately if you stand up, use items, change equip or are hit by somebody else.

LK_BERSERK.name: Berserk
LK_BERSERK.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Requires you to have a JobLV of at least 50. It triples your HP and replenishes them (to the now tripled maximum), doubles your Damage, increases your ASPD by 30%,
increases your movement speed (does not stack with other increase except Peco Peco), gives the Endure effect at no further cost but halves your Flee Rate and sets ALL Def AND Mdef to 0 for the skill's duration.
It also drains 5% of your current HP every 15 seconds. You cannot chat (chat mute), change equips, use any healing items or receive any heals while this skill is in effect.
You do not regain HP and SP naturally for 5 minutes after the skill ends (you can be healed or use items though). The Skill cancels out if your HP drops to 100 or below. Can be used during Guild Siege.

HP_ASSUMPTIO.name: Assumptio
HP_ASSUMPTIO.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Reduce damage taken from enemies by half for the spell's duration. Cannot be cast inside a guild castle, but retains its effect after entering one.
Casting Kyrie Eleison on someone that has Assumptio will cancel Assumptio, likewise casting Assumptio on someone with Kyrie will cancel Kyrie. 
[Lv 1]: Duration 20 Sec 
[Lv 2]: Duration 40 Sec 
[Lv 3]: Duration 60 Sec 
[Lv 4]: Duration 80 Sec 
[Lv 5]: Duration 100 Sec

HP_BASILICA.name: Basilica
HP_BASILICA.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: This skill creates an absolutely perfect defense zone of 5x5 cells around the caster that blocks any type of attack out of~ or into this area.
Anyone can come in, but people who are inside cannot attack. The skill is canceled if the Priest moves or uses another skill. Does not work against Boss monsters and can't be used during the War of Emperium.
This skill Requires 1 Blue Gemstone ,1 Yellow Gemstone, 1 Red Gemstone  and 1 Holy Water. 
[Lv 1]: Duration 20 Sec 
[Lv 2]: Duration 25 Sec 
[Lv 3]: Duration 30 Sec 
[Lv 4]: Duration 35 Sec 
[Lv 5]: Duration 40 Sec

HP_MEDITATIO.name: Meditatio
HP_MEDITATIO.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Passive 
Description: When meditating (sitting), you will have a better SP Recovery as well as increase your Maximum SP.
This skill also improves the amount of HP that are healed by the Heal skill by 2% per SkillLV (sitting is of course not required). 
[Lv 1]: MaxSP +1%, SP regen +3% 
[Lv 2]: MaxSP +2%, SP regen +6% 
[Lv 3]: MaxSP +3%, SP regen +9% 
[Lv 4]: MaxSP +4%, SP regen +12% 
[Lv 5]: MaxSP +5%, SP regen +15% 
[Lv 6]: MaxSP +6%, SP regen +18% 
[Lv 7]: MaxSP +7%, SP regen +21% 
[Lv 8]: MaxSP +8%, SP regen +24% 
[Lv 9]: MaxSP +9%, SP regen +27% 
[Lv 10]: MaxSP +10%, SP regen +30%

HW_SOULDRAIN.name: Soul Drain
HW_SOULDRAIN.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Passive 
Description: Every time you kill an enemy using spells, you will receive a certain amount of SP back, depending on the monster level.
The formula is MonsterLV x Drain. The Drain amount is (95+15*SkillLV)% (e.g. killing a LV 20 Enemy with a LV 5 Soul Drain will give you 34 SP). This skill also increases your Maximum SP by 2% per SkillLV.
The SP drain only works for targeted spells, not area spells. 
[Lv 1]: MaxSP +2% 
[Lv 2]: MaxSP +4% 
[Lv 3]: MaxSP +6% 
[Lv 4]: MaxSP +8% 
[Lv 5]: MaxSP +10% 
[Lv 6]: MaxSP +12% 
[Lv 7]: MaxSP +14% 
[Lv 8]: MaxSP +16% 
[Lv 9]: MaxSP +18% 
[Lv 10]: MaxSP +20%

HW_MAGICCRASHER.name: Magic Crasher
HW_MAGICCRASHER.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Magical attack 
Description: You do an attack that calculates damage using your Matk instead of Atk but is decreased using enemy's Def, not Mdef.
This skills overall damage is affected by cards you have in your weapon, weapon element, size and element of the target and it might miss depending on your Dex.

HW_MAGICPOWER.name: Amplify Magic Power
HW_MAGICPOWER.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active 
Description: This skill amplifies the spell damage by boosting your Matk for the first spell (yes, only one spell) following this skill. The bonus is 5% per SkillLV. 
[Lv 1]: Matk +5% 
[Lv 2]: Matk +10% 
[Lv 3]: Matk +15% 
[Lv 4]: Matk +20% 
[Lv 5]: Matk +25% 
[Lv 6]: Matk +30% 
[Lv 7]: Matk +35% 
[Lv 8]: Matk +40% 
[Lv 9]: Matk +45% 
[Lv 10]: Matk +50%

PA_PRESSURE.name: Pressure
PA_PRESSURE.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Physical attack 
Description: Summons a massive crucifix to crush enemies. This skill inflicts a fixed amount of damage, depending on the skill's level, which ignores DEF and ATK.
On other players, this skill will also drain SP. Pressure cannot be cancelled by any method. 
[Lv 1]: 800 Damage 
[Lv 2]: 1100 Damage 
[Lv 3]: 1400 Damage 
[Lv 4]: 1700 Damage 
[Lv 5]: 2000 Damage

PA_SACRIFICE.name: Sacrifice
PA_SACRIFICE.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Enhances the damage of 5 physical attacks after activating this skill. Each attack enhanced by Sacrifice will drain an amount of HP equal to 9% of character's MaxHP. 
[Lv 1]: Damage * 1 
[Lv 2]: Damage * 1.1 
[Lv 3]: Damage * 1.2 
[Lv 4]: Damage * 1.3 
[Lv 5]: Damage * 1.4

PA_GOSPEL.name: Gospel
PA_GOSPEL.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active 
Range: 7 cells around the caster 
Description: Sings a hymn that will cause one out of 10 different negative status effects to enemies and will endow one out of 10 positive statuses upon Party Members within this skill's range.
This skill is cancelled if the caster is Silenced during the casting of Gospel.

CH_PALMSTRIKE.name: Palm Push Strike
CH_PALMSTRIKE.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Physical attack 
Description: Strikes an enemy using the palms, pushing back the enemy and causing damage, which is determined by the skill's level, after 1 second delay.
This skill can only be used during the Explosion Spirits status. 
[Lv 1]: 300% damage 
[Lv 2]: 400% damage 
[Lv 3]: 500% damage 
[Lv 4]: 600% damage 
[Lv 5]: 700% damage

CH_TIGERFIST.name: Tiger Knuckle Fist
CH_TIGERFIST.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Physical attack 
Description: A combo skill that can be cast after using Chain Combo.
An enemy hit by this skill is immobilized for a short period of time.
Each cast requires 1 Spirit Sphere. 
[Lv 1]: 140% damage, immobilized chance 20% 
[Lv 2]: 240% damage, immobilized chance 30% 
[Lv 3]: 340% damage, immobilized chance 40% 
[Lv 4]: 440% damage, immobilized chance 50% 
[Lv 5]: 540% damage, immobilized chance 60%

CH_CHAINCRUSH.name: Chain Crush Combo
CH_CHAINCRUSH.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Physical attack 
Description: Also a combination skill, can only be chained after Combo Finish OR Tiger Knuckle Fist. Tiger Knuckle Fist can not be chained after this, but Asura Strike can. 
[Lv 1]: 500% damage 
[Lv 2]: 600% damage 
[Lv 3]: 700% damage 
[Lv 4]: 800% damage 
[Lv 5]: 900% damage 
[Lv 6]: 1000% damage 
[Lv 7]: 1100% damage 
[Lv 8]: 1200% damage 
[Lv 9]: 1300% damage 
[Lv 10]: 1400% damage

PF_HPCONVERSION.name: Health Conversion
PF_HPCONVERSION.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Converts 10% of your HP into SP. The higher the skill level the more effective the conversion will be. The conversion rate is 10:1 modified by SkillLV, so a 2000 HP Professor with Health Conversion LV 3 would consume 2000*10%=200 HP and obtain a total of 200*30%=60 SP. 
[Lv 1]: 10% of the converted HP 
[Lv 2]: 20% of the converted HP 
[Lv 3]: 30% of the converted HP 
[Lv 4]: 40% of the converted HP 
[Lv 5]: 50% of the converted HP

PF_SOULCHANGE.name: Soul Change
PF_SOULCHANGE.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Exchange SP of the target with your SP. With this exchange it's not possible for any of the partners to exceed their Maximum SP. If you use this on a monster, you regain 3% of your SP.
You can't use this skill on a monster again that already had Soul Change. You can use this skill in Siege Mode (WoE).

PF_SOULBURN.name: Soul Burn
PF_SOULBURN.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Magical attack 
Description: This skill will burn all SP the target has, thus damaging it with its own SP. Since this damage is done to the mental system, it will be decreased by the target's Mdef.
If you fail this skill, YOUR SP will be drained, and you will damage yourself. The damage is equal to twice the removed SP. 
[Lv 1]: 40% Success Rate 
[Lv 2]: 50% Success Rate 
[Lv 3]: 60% Success Rate 
[Lv 4]: 70% Success Rate 
[Lv 5]: 70% Success Rate, Damage=2x SP

ASC_KATAR.name: Advanced Katar Mastery
ASC_KATAR.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Passive 
Description: Enhances damage inflicted with Katar class weapons. 
[Lv 1]: Damage +12% 
[Lv 2]: Damage +14% 
[Lv 3]: Damage +16% 
[Lv 4]: Damage +18% 
[Lv 5]: Damage +20%

ASC_EDP.name: Enchant Deadly Poison
ASC_EDP.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Enchants equipped weapon with deadly poison to enhance its damage and poison targets by chance, causing the target's HP to dramatically decrease for the poison's duration.
This damage enhancement will not apply to Boss monsters.
Each cast requires 1 Poison Bottle.

ASC_BREAKER.name: Soul Destroyer
ASC_BREAKER.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Physical attack 
Description: Inflicts a ranged attack to a target, calculated as half of the target's DEF added to half of its MDEF, that is affected by the caster's INT and ATK.

SN_SIGHT.name: True Sight
SN_SIGHT.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Adds +5 to all Stats, as well as increases attack accuracy, weapon damage and critical attack rate. 
[Lv 1]: Hit +3%, Damage +2%, Crit +1 
[Lv 2]: Hit +6%, Damage +4%, Crit +2 
[Lv 3]: Hit +9%, Damage +6%, Crit +3 
[Lv 4]: Hit +12%, Damage +8%, Crit +4 
[Lv 5]: Hit +15%, Damage +10%, Crit +5 
[Lv 6]: Hit +18%, Damage +12%, Crit +6 
[Lv 7]: Hit +21%, Damage +14%, Crit +7 
[Lv 8]: Hit +24%, Damage +16%, Crit +8 
[Lv 9]: Hit +27%, Damage +18%, Crit +9 
[Lv 10]: Hit +30%, Damage +20%, Crit +10

SN_FALCONASSAULT.name: Falcon Assault
SN_FALCONASSAULT.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Physical attack 
Description: Commands Falcon to attack an enemy with numerous strikes.

SN_SHARPSHOOTING.name: Sharp Shooting
SN_SHARPSHOOTING.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Physical attack 
Description: Shoots an arrow with incredible might directly towards a targeted spot, greatly damaging any enemies in its path.
This is a Critical Attack that is calculated as the caster's Critical Attack Rate +20. 
[Lv 1]: Damage +150% 
[Lv 2]: Damage +200% 
[Lv 3]: Damage +250% 
[Lv 4]: Damage +300% 
[Lv 5]: Damage +350%

SN_WINDWALK.name: Wind Walk
SN_WINDWALK.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Increases movement speed and Flee Rate of the caster and Party Members.
However, movement speed will not increased if a similar effect, such as Increase Agility, has already been cast.
Skills which decrease movement speed, such as Quagmire, cancel the movement speed increase from Wind Walker.

WS_MELTDOWN.name: Melt Down
WS_MELTDOWN.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active 
Description: This skill has the chance of destroying an equipped weapon or armor when used in PvP zones on other players, or to decrease Attack Power or Defense when used on monsters.
This skill's level affects its duration and rate of success. 
[Lv 1]: 15 sec duration 
[Lv 2]: 20 sec duration 
[Lv 3]: 25 sec duration 
[Lv 4]: 30 sec duration 
[Lv 5]: 35 sec duration 
[Lv 6]: 40 sec duration 
[Lv 7]: 45 sec duration 
[Lv 8]: 50 sec duration 
[Lv 9]: 55 sec duration 
[Lv 10]: 60 sec duration

WS_CARTBOOST.name: Cart Boost
WS_CARTBOOST.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Increases Movement Speed when a Pushcart is equipped.
Effect which decrease movement speed cannot interfere with this skill.

ST_CHASEWALK.name: Chase Walk
ST_CHASEWALK.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Enters a special Hiding status in which caster can move without being detected by skills.
However, the caster will leave footprints and can be damaged by skills that target the ground. Ineffective against Insect, Demon and Boss monsters.
During WoE, this skill will consume 5 times as much SP. 
[Lv 1]: 70% Movement Speed,
12 SP/10 sec, +1 STR after 10 seconds. 
[Lv 2]: 75% Movement Speed,
14 SP/10 sec, +2 STR after 10 seconds. 
[Lv 3]: 80% Movement Speed,
16 SP/10 sec, +4 STR after 10 seconds. 
[Lv 4]: 85% Movement Speed,
18 SP/10 sec, +8 STR after 10 seconds. 
[Lv 5]: 90% Movement Speed,
20 SP/10 sec, +16 STR after 10 seconds.

ST_REJECTSWORD.name: Sword Reject
ST_REJECTSWORD.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: If enemy is using a Sword Class Weapon, activating this skill can deflect attacks, reducing damage from Swords by half.
A total of 3 attacks can be deflected after this skill is casted.
On monsters, the damage that is deflected will be directed back at the monster. 
[Lv 1]: 15% Chance of Reflection 
[Lv 2]: 30% Chance of Reflection 
[Lv 3]: 45% Chance of Reflection 
[Lv 4]: 60% Chance of Reflection 
[Lv 5]: 75% Chance of Reflection

CR_ALCHEMY.name: Alchemy
CR_ALCHEMY.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description:  This skill has been dropped by Gravity. 
You can create many items that are needed for the Pharmacy skill such as Empty Bottles, Empty Potion Bottles and Test Tubes.

CR_SYNTHESISPOTION.name: Synthesis Potion
CR_SYNTHESISPOTION.description:
Max Level: Unknown 
Skill Form: Active 
Description:  This skill has been dropped by Gravity. 
Combine different potions to create new ones. There are already set rules to what can
be mixed, and the problem is the success rate. You can create potions that weigh less, but perform the same... or create heavier potions that heal for far more. For potions that summon
creatures to attack, they might have better attack rate, or have a new skill to use.

CG_ARROWVULCAN.name: Arrow Vulcan
CG_ARROWVULCAN.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Physical attack 
Description: Fires an awesome flurry of arrows at a targeted enemy.
Requires Musical Instrument for Clown and Whip for Gypsy. 
[Lv 1]: 300% damage 
[Lv 2]: 400% damage 
[Lv 3]: 500% damage 
[Lv 4]: 600% damage 
[Lv 5]: 700% damage 
[Lv 6]: 800% damage 
[Lv 7]: 900% damage 
[Lv 8]: 1000% damage 
[Lv 9]: 1100% damage 
[Lv 10]: 1200% damage

CG_MOONLIT.name: Moonlit Water Mill
CG_MOONLIT.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Ensemble 
Upkeep SP Cost: 4*SkillLV SP every 10 sec 
Description: Clown and Gypsy ensemble skill that creates a 5*5 cell area around the casters where other players and monsters cannot enter.
This skill cannot offer protection from magic or long ranged attacks.
This skill cannot be cast in areas that are adjacent to obstacles. 
[Lv 1]: 20 sec duration 
[Lv 2]: 25 sec duration 
[Lv 3]: 30 sec duration 
[Lv 4]: 35 sec duration 
[Lv 5]: 40 sec duration

CG_MARIONETTE.name: Marionette Control
CG_MARIONETTE.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Targeted Party Member receives a bonus to all Stats equal to half of the Stats of the caster.
However, each of the target's Stats cannot exceed 99.
This skill is cancelled if this Party Member is more than 7 cells away from the caster.

LK_SPIRALPIERCE.name: Spiral Pierce
LK_SPIRALPIERCE.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Physical attack 
Description: Hits an enemy with spiraling strikes that immobilize it for a second and inflict an amount of damage determined by the skill's level and the weight of the equipped weapon.
This skill's level also affects its cast time and delay.

LK_HEADCRUSH.name: Head Crush
LK_HEADCRUSH.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Physical attack 
Description: Brutally strikes an enemy with the chance of causing the Bleeding status, which will make the target continuously receive extra damage for a while. 
[Lv 1]: 140% damage 
[Lv 2]: 180% damage 
[Lv 3]: 220% damage 
[Lv 4]: 260% damage 
[Lv 5]: 300% damage

LK_JOINTBEAT.name: Joint Beat
LK_JOINTBEAT.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Physical attack 
Description: Strikes an enemy's vital point to cause various abnormal statuses.
This skill's level affects the Attack Power and the success rate of causing abnormal status effects.
Requires Spear Class Weapon. 
[Lv 1]: 60% damage 
[Lv 2]: 70% damage 
[Lv 3]: 80% damage 
[Lv 4]: 90% damage 
[Lv 5]: 100% damage 
[Lv 6]: 110% damage 
[Lv 7]: 120% damage 
[Lv 8]: 130% damage 
[Lv 9]: 140% damage 
[Lv 10]: 150% damage

HW_NAPALMVULCAN.name: Napalm Vulcan
HW_NAPALMVULCAN.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Magical attack 
Element: Ghost 
Description: Delivers multiple psychokinetic blows at an enemy with a low chance of causing an abnormal status.
This skill's level affects the number of strikes from Napalm Vulcan.

CH_SOULCOLLECT.name: Dangerous Soul Collect
CH_SOULCOLLECT.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Summons 5 Spirit Spheres at one time.
The cast time of this skill is twice the cast time of the Call Spirits skill.

PF_MINDBREAKER.name: Mind Breaker
PF_MINDBREAKER.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Induces mental turmoil in an enemy that will reduce its Magic Defense, but will also increases its Magic Attack Power.
This skill's level affects its rate of success. 
[Lv 1]: Matk +20% Mdef -12% 
[Lv 2]: Matk +40% Mdef -24% 
[Lv 3]: Matk +60% Mdef -36% 
[Lv 4]: Matk +80% Mdef -48% 
[Lv 5]: Matk +100% Mdef -60%

PF_MEMORIZE.name: Memorize
PF_MEMORIZE.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Reduces cast time for a skill by half for 5 casts.
This skill is canceled when caster dies, but otherwise it has no duration.
Memorize's cast time, which is unaffected by DEX, is 5 seconds.

PF_FOGWALL.name: Wall of Fog
PF_FOGWALL.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Magical attack 
Description: Creates a wall of fog in a 5*3 cell area that will cause the Blind status on players and monsters.
All long ranged attacks targeted at players within the skill's range will have a greater chance of missing and have reduced damage.
Negative effects only apply to monsters in normal fields, but will also apply to players in PvP zones.

PF_SPIDERWEB.name: Spider Web
PF_SPIDERWEB.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Shoots a spider web that will bind and immobilize a target, and decrease its Flee Rate by half for 8 seconds.
Fire elemental attacks will cause 2.5 times more damage on Fiber Locked targets and cancel the Fiber Locked status.
A maximum of 2 Spider Webs can be shot at once.
Consumes 1 Cobweb.

ASC_METEORASSAULT.name: Meteor Assault
ASC_METEORASSAULT.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Physical attack 
Description: Attacks all enemies in a 5*5 cell area around the caster with the chance of causing status such as Stun, Blind or Bleed. 
[Lv 1]: 80% damage 
[Lv 2]: 120% damage 
[Lv 3]: 160% damage 
[Lv 4]: 200% damage 
[Lv 5]: 240% damage 
[Lv 6]: 280% damage 
[Lv 7]: 320% damage 
[Lv 8]: 360% damage 
[Lv 9]: 400% damage 
[Lv 10]: 440% damage

ASC_CDP.name: Create Deadly Poison
ASC_CDP.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Creates a bottle of Deadly Poison that will increase the ASPD of Assassin Crosses with the risk of being inflicted with the Poison status, but will instantly kill characters in any other job if they drink it.
Caster's DEX and LUK affect this skill's success rate.
If this skill fails, the caster loses an amount of HP equal to 25% of his MaxHP.
Items required to create Deadly Poison:
1 Empty Bottle
1 Poison Spore
1 Venom Canine
1 Bee Sting
1 Cactus Needle
1 Berserk Potion
1 Karvodailnirol

WE_BABY.name: Mom, Dad, I love you!
WE_BABY.description:
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Caster's parent characters will not lose any experience points when they die.
Caster consumes 10% of Maximum SP for each use.

WE_CALLPARENT.name: Mom, Dad, I miss you!
WE_CALLPARENT.description:
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Child character summons parents to a spot next to where child is standing.

WE_CALLBABY.name: Come to me, honey~
WE_CALLBABY.description:
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Parent character summons adopted child to a spot adjacent to parent's current location.

TK_RUN.name: Running
TK_RUN.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Movement & Passive 
Description: Enables the caster to run with incredible speed.
At level 7 and above, this skill endows the caster with the Spurt status, which will temporarily increase STR for 150 seconds, If the caster stops running and is barehanded.
Spurt status is canceled if the caster equips a weapon.
Each level of the Run skill increases its user's barehanded damage by +10. 
[Lv 1]: 6 Sec cast time, 100 SP 
[Lv 2]: 5 Sec cast time, 90 SP 
[Lv 3]: 4 Sec cast time, 80 SP 
[Lv 4]: 3 Sec cast time, 70 SP 
[Lv 5]: 2 Sec cast time, 60 SP 
[Lv 6]: 1 Sec cast time, 50 SP 
[Lv 7]: 0 Sec cast time, 40 SP 
[Lv 8]: 0 Sec cast time, 30 SP 
[Lv 9]: 0 Sec cast time, 20 SP 
[Lv 10]: 0 Sec cast time, 10 SP

TK_READYSTORM.name: Prepare Whirlwind Kick
TK_READYSTORM.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Enables a 15% chance of automatically entering Tornado Stance when the caster successfully hits a target. 
Soul Linkers cannot perform this skill. 
[Lv 1]: 0 Sec Cast Time, 1 SP

TK_STORMKICK.name: Whirlwind Kick
TK_STORMKICK.description:
Max Level: 7
Skill Form: Physical attack 
Description: Caster must be in Tornado Stance to perform this skill which will attack all enemies within a 5*5 cell area around the caster. 
Soul Linkers cannot perform this skill. 
[Lv 1]: 14 SP, 180% damage 
[Lv 2]: 12 SP, 200% damage 
[Lv 3]: 10 SP, 220% damage 
[Lv 4]: 8 SP, 240% damage 
[Lv 5]: 6 SP, 260% damage 
[Lv 6]: 4 SP, 280% damage 
[Lv 7]: 2 SP, 300% damage

TK_READYDOWN.name: Prepare Axe Kick
TK_READYDOWN.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Enables a 15% chance of automatically entering Heel Drop Stance when the caster successfully hits a target.
Soul Linkers cannot perform this skill. 
[Lv 1]: 0 Sec Cast Time, 1 SP

TK_DOWNKICK.name: Axe Kick
TK_DOWNKICK.description:
Max Level: 7
Skill Form: Physical attack 
Description: Caster must be in Heel Drop Stance to perform this skill which will inflict damage and cause the Stun effect for 3 seconds on the targeted enemy. 
Soul Linkers cannot perform this skill. 
[Lv 1]: 14 SP, 180% damage 
[Lv 2]: 12 SP, 200% damage 
[Lv 3]: 10 SP, 220% damage 
[Lv 4]: 8 SP, 240% damage 
[Lv 5]: 6 SP, 260% damage 
[Lv 6]: 4 SP, 280% damage 
[Lv 7]: 2 SP, 300% damage

TK_READYTURN.name: Prepare Round Kick
TK_READYTURN.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Enables a 15% chance of automatically entering Roundhouse Stance when the caster successfully hits a target.
Soul Linkers cannot perform this skill. 
[Lv 1]: 0 Sec Cast Time, 1 SP

TK_TURNKICK.name: Round Kick
TK_TURNKICK.description:
Max Level: 7
Skill Form: Physical attack 
Description: Caster must be in Roundhouse Stance to perform this skill which will damage its target and push back enemies around the target.
Enemies that are pushed do not receive any damage. 
Soul Linkers cannot perform this skill. 
[Lv 1]: 14 SP, 220% damage 
[Lv 2]: 12 SP, 250% damage 
[Lv 3]: 10 SP, 280% damage 
[Lv 4]: 8 SP, 310% damage 
[Lv 5]: 6 SP, 340% damage 
[Lv 6]: 4 SP, 370% damage 
[Lv 7]: 2 SP, 400% damage

TK_READYCOUNTER.name: Prepare Counter Kick
TK_READYCOUNTER.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Enables a 20% chance of automatically entering Counter Kick Stance when the caster successfully hits a target.
Soul Linkers cannot perform this skill. 
[Lv 1]: 0 Sec Cast Time, 1 SP

TK_COUNTER.name: Counter Kick
TK_COUNTER.description:
Max Level: 7
Skill Form: Physical attack 
Description: Caster must be in Counter Kick Stance to perform this skill which will always hit its target. 
Soul Linkers cannot perform this skill. 
[Lv 1]: 14 SP, 220% damage 
[Lv 2]: 12 SP, 250% damage 
[Lv 3]: 10 SP, 280% damage 
[Lv 4]: 8 SP, 310% damage 
[Lv 5]: 6 SP, 340% damage 
[Lv 6]: 4 SP, 370% damage 
[Lv 7]: 2 SP, 400% damage 0

TK_DODGE.name: Break Fall
TK_DODGE.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Enables a 20% chance of blocking long ranged physical attacks.
When caster is in Spurt status (after performing Lv 7 Sprint or higher), Tumbling will also block other kinds of attacks. 
[Lv 1]: 0 Sec Cast Time, 1 SP

TK_JUMPKICK.name: Flying Side Kick
TK_JUMPKICK.description:
Max Level: 7
Skill Form: Physical attack 
Description: Attacks a distant enemy with a kick that instantly close the gap between the target and the player.
When in Tumbling status, the caster's Base Level affects the amount of inflicted damage.
Flying Kick will have increased damage affected by Base Level during Sprint status.
If Spurt and Sprint statuses are both active, Flying Kick will inflict enhanced damage.
Flying Kick will also cancel most positive statuses on the target, which include Spirit statuses endowed by Soul Linkers, One Hand Quicken, Kaahi, Kaite, and the Berserk Potion effect.
However, Stalkers can protect themselves from this positive status removal effect with their Preserve skill.
Soul Linkers cannot perform this skill. 
[Lv 1]: 70 SP, 40% damage 
[Lv 2]: 60 SP, 50% damage 
[Lv 3]: 50 SP, 60% damage 
[Lv 4]: 40 SP, 70% damage 
[Lv 5]: 30 SP, 80% damage 
[Lv 6]: 20 SP, 90% damage 
[Lv 7]: 10 SP, 100% damage

TK_HPTIME.name: Peaceful Rest
TK_HPTIME.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Passive 
Description: When two or more Taekwon class characters sit next to each other, HP will be restored for both characters.
This HP restoration is affected by VIT and enhanced by an additional 30 HP with the /doridori command. 
[Lv 1]: 30 HP 
[Lv 2]: 60 HP 
[Lv 3]: 90 HP 
[Lv 4]: 120 HP 
[Lv 5]: 160 HP 
[Lv 6]: 180 HP 
[Lv 7]: 210 HP 
[Lv 8]: 240 HP 
[Lv 9]: 270 HP 
[Lv 10]: 300 HP

TK_SPTIME.name: Enjoyable Rest
TK_SPTIME.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Passive 
Description: When two or more Taekwon class characters sit next to each other, SP will be restored for both characters.
This SP restoration is affected by MaxSP and enhanced by an additional 3 SP with the /doridori command.
Using the /doridori command while in Happy Break status will make it last for 30 minutes.
During this status, the caster will have a low chance of using the Earth Spike spell scroll, with a 10% chance at Skill Level 1, and a 1% chance at Skill Level 10.
Using the Earth Spike scroll during this status will consume 10 SP. 
[Lv 1]: 3 SP 
[Lv 2]: 6 SP 
[Lv 3]: 9 SP 
[Lv 4]: 12 SP 
[Lv 5]: 16 SP 
[Lv 6]: 18 SP 
[Lv 7]: 21 SP 
[Lv 8]: 24 SP 
[Lv 9]: 27 SP 
[Lv 10]: 30 SP

TK_POWER.name: Fighting Chant
TK_POWER.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Passive 
Description: Increases Attack Power based on the number of Party Members on the same map.
Normal attacks, and skills with 500% power, inflict an amount of additional according to the skill's level. 
[Lv 1]: 2% per person in party 
[Lv 2]: 4% per person in party 
[Lv 3]: 6% per person in party 
[Lv 4]: 8% per person in party 
[Lv 5]: 10% per person in party

TK_SEVENWIND.name: Warm Wind
TK_SEVENWIND.description:
Max Level: 7
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Summons a wind that will enchant the caster's attacks for 5 minutes with an elemental property based on the level of the casted skill. 
[Lv 1]: Earth 
[Lv 2]: Wind 
[Lv 3]: Water 
[Lv 4]: Fire 
[Lv 5]: Ghost 
[Lv 6]: Shadow 
[Lv 7]: Holy

TK_HIGHJUMP.name: High Jump
TK_HIGHJUMP.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Leaps to a targeted cell within the skill's range.
So long as the targeted cell is accesibble, the caster can leap over walls and obstacles.
Leap cannot be used in areas where Fly Wings are disabled, except for WoE maps. 
Cast Time & Skill Range by Level
[Lv 1]: 5 sec, 2 cells 
[Lv 2]: 4 sec, 4 cells 
[Lv 3]: 3 sec, 6 cells 
[Lv 4]: 2 sec, 8 cells 
[Lv 5]: 1 sec, 10 cells

SG_FEEL.name: Feeling of the Sun, Moon and Stars
SG_FEEL.description:
Max Level: 3
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Designate the current map with one of the cosmic alignments, Solar, Lunar or Stellar, for the use of certain skills.
It is impossible to change a map's cosmic alignment once it is designated.
Using this skill on a cosmically aligned map will display a list of map designations. 
Only 1 map may be designated for each cosmic alignment. 
[Lv 1]: Designate current map with Solar alignment 
[Lv 2]: Designate current map with Lunar alignment 
[Lv 3]: Designate current map with Stellar alignment

SG_SUN_WARM.name: Warmth of the Sun
SG_SUN_WARM.description:
Max Level: 3
Skill Form: Active 
Description: You can use this skill anytime in a map designated as "Place of the Sun" (in other maps the skill don't trigger and the SP is not spent).
When this skill is used, it creates an offensive barrier around you, affecting 3x3 cells centered on you. It deals 100% damage to monsters right next to you, and push them back by 2 cells. Enemy players receive SP damage instead of HP, and no push back.
Every time the barrier hits, it takes away 2 SP. If you do not have enough SP, the barrier will disappear without making damage. 
[Lv 1]: lasts 10 sec 
[Lv 2]: lasts 20 sec 
[Lv 3]: lasts 60 sec

SG_MOON_WARM.name: Warmth of the Moon
SG_MOON_WARM.description:
Max Level: 3
Skill Form: Active 
Description: You can use this skill anytime in a map designated as "Place of the Moon" (in other maps the skill don't trigger and the SP is not spent).
When this skill is used, it creates an offensive barrier around you, affecting 3x3 cells centered on you. It deals 100% damage to monsters right next to you, and push them back by 2 cells. Enemy players receive SP damage instead of HP, and no push back.
Every time the barrier hits, it takes away 2 SP. If you do not have enough SP, the barrier will disappear without making damage. 
[Lv 1]: lasts 10 sec 
[Lv 2]: lasts 20 sec 
[Lv 3]: lasts 60 sec

SG_STAR_WARM.name: Warmth of the Stars
SG_STAR_WARM.description:
Max Level: 3
Skill Form: Active 
Description: You can use this skill anytime in a map designated as "Place of the Stars" (in other maps the skill don't trigger and the SP is not spent).
When this skill is used, it creates an offensive barrier around you, affecting 3x3 cells centered on you. It deals 100% damage to monsters right next to you, and push them back by 2 cells. Enemy players receive SP damage instead of HP, and no push back.
Every time the barrier hits, it takes away 2 SP. If you do not have enough SP, the barrier will disappear without making damage. 
[Lv 1]: lasts 10 sec 
[Lv 2]: lasts 20 sec 
[Lv 3]: lasts 60 sec

SG_SUN_COMFORT.name: Comfort of the Sun
SG_SUN_COMFORT.description:
Max Level: 4
Skill Form: Active 
Description: It can be used anytime when you are in the Day of the Sun in the map that is memorized as "Place of the Sun" (in other days or maps the skill don't trigger and the SP is not spent).
This skill increases your Vit Defense by (LV+Dex+Luk)/2. If Def changes during its duration, the skill is cancelled. 
[Lv 1]: 80 sec 
[Lv 2]: 160 sec 
[Lv 3]: 240 sec 
[Lv 4]: 320 sec

SG_MOON_COMFORT.name: Comfort of the Moon
SG_MOON_COMFORT.description:
Max Level: 4
Skill Form: Active 
Description: It can be used anytime when you are in the Day of the Moon in the map that is memorized as "Place of the Moon" (in other days or maps the skill don't trigger and the SP is not spent).
This skill increases your Flee Rate by (LV+Dex+Luk)/10. 
[Lv 1]: 80 sec 
[Lv 2]: 160 sec 
[Lv 3]: 240 sec 
[Lv 4]: 320 sec

SG_STAR_COMFORT.name: Comfort of the Stars
SG_STAR_COMFORT.description:
Max Level: 4
Skill Form: Active 
Description: It can be used anytime when you are in the Day of the Stars in the map that is memorized as "Place of the Stars" (in other days or maps the skill don't trigger and the SP is not spent).
This skill increases your ASPD by [(LV+Dex+Luk)/10]%. 
[Lv 1]: 80 sec 
[Lv 2]: 160 sec 
[Lv 3]: 240 sec 
[Lv 4]: 320 sec

SG_HATE.name: Hatred of the Sun, Moon, and Stars
SG_HATE.description:
Max Level: 3
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Can be casted only once per Target. When you use this skill, the name of the monster whom you just marked will be displayed and marked.
You can also use this on player characters, and they will be categorized by class, ignoring size and HP.
Example: It will show above the player characters, Champion, if target player was a Champion character, and on all other characters who are of Champion class. 
[Lv 1]: Mark as Target of the Sun. On mobs, it can only be used on Small monsters. 
[Lv 2]: Mark as Target of the Moon. On mobs, it can only be used on Medium size monsters that have a Maximum HP higher than 6,000. 
[Lv 3]: Mark as Target of the Stars. On mobs, it can only be used on Large size monsters that have a Maximum HP higher than 20,000.

SG_SUN_ANGER.name: Anger of the Sun
SG_SUN_ANGER.description:
Max Level: 3
Skill Form: Passive 
Description: Grants a bonus of +((BaseLV+Luk+Dex)/(13-3*SkillLV))% damage against Target of the Sun mobs. 
[Lv 1]: +((BaseLV+Luk+Dex)/9)% damage 
[Lv 2]: +((BaseLV+Luk+Dex)/6)% damage 
[Lv 3]: +((BaseLV+Luk+Dex)/3)% damage

SG_MOON_ANGER.name: Anger of the Moon
SG_MOON_ANGER.description:
Max Level: 3
Skill Form: Passive 
Description: Grants a bonus of +((BaseLV+Luk+Dex)/(13-3*SkillLV))% damage against Target of the Moon mobs. 
[Lv 1]: +((BaseLV+Luk+Dex)/9)% damage 
[Lv 2]: +((BaseLV+Luk+Dex)/6)% damage 
[Lv 3]: +((BaseLV+Luk+Dex)/3)% damage

SG_STAR_ANGER.name: Anger of the Stars
SG_STAR_ANGER.description:
Max Level: 3
Skill Form: Passive 
Description: Grants a bonus of +((BaseLV+Luk+Dex)/(13-3*SkillLV))% damage against Target of the Stars mobs. 
[Lv 1]: +((BaseLV+Luk+Dex)/9)% damage 
[Lv 2]: +((BaseLV+Luk+Dex)/6)% damage 
[Lv 3]: +((BaseLV+Luk+Dex)/3)% damage

SG_SUN_BLESS.name: Blessing of the Sun
SG_SUN_BLESS.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Passive 
Description: Increases EXP given by Target of the Sun (monsters only) in the Day of the Sun by (10*SkillLV)%. 
[Lv 1]: +10% EXP 
[Lv 2]: +20% EXP 
[Lv 3]: +30% EXP 
[Lv 4]: +40% EXP 
[Lv 5]: +50% EXP

SG_MOON_BLESS.name: Blessing of the Moon
SG_MOON_BLESS.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Passive 
Description: Increases EXP given by Target of the Moon (monsters only) in the Day of the Moon by (10*SkillLV)%. 
[Lv 1]: +10% EXP 
[Lv 2]: +20% EXP 
[Lv 3]: +30% EXP 
[Lv 4]: +40% EXP 
[Lv 5]: +50% EXP

SG_STAR_BLESS.name: Blessing of the Stars
SG_STAR_BLESS.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Passive 
Description: Increases EXP given by Target of the Stars (monsters only) in the Day of the Stars by (20*SkillLV)%. 
[Lv 1]: +20% EXP 
[Lv 2]: +40% EXP 
[Lv 3]: +60% EXP 
[Lv 4]: +80% EXP 
[Lv 5]: +100% EXP

SG_DEVIL.name: Demon of the Sun, Moon and Stars
SG_DEVIL.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Passive 
Description: This skill's effects will only activate for Job Lv. 50 characters.
Increasing this skills' level will permanently increase Attack Speed and reduce character's vision, similarly to the Blind effect. 
[Lv 1]: After attack delay -3% 
[Lv 2]: After attack delay -6% 
[Lv 3]: After attack delay -9% 
[Lv 4]: After attack delay -12% 
[Lv 5]: After attack delay -15% 
[Lv 6]: After attack delay -18% 
[Lv 7]: After attack delay -21% 
[Lv 8]: After attack delay -24% 
[Lv 9]: After attack delay -27% 
[Lv 10]: After attack delay -30%

SG_FRIEND.name: Friend of the Sun, Moon and Stars
SG_FRIEND.description:
Max Level: 3
Skill Form: Passive 
Description: When Star Gladiator uses Counter Kick, all Monks in the same party will have their Triple Attack chance increased.
If the Monks who are in same party as Star Gladiator activate Combo Finish, Star Gladiator's chance of Counter Kick increases.
The chance increase is not added to the current one, e.g. having this skill at LV 1 will not give 100% Triple Attack/Counter Kick but just double the chance for those skills to occur. 
[Lv 1]: +100%, base chance x 1.2 
[Lv 2]: +150%, base chance x 1.5 
[Lv 3]: +200%, base chance x 2

SG_KNOWLEDGE.name: Knowledge of the Sun, Moon and Stars
SG_KNOWLEDGE.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Passive 
Description: When you login the game on a map (only login, NOT by walking/teleporting) that is designated as Place of the Sun, or Moon, or Stars, this passive skill grants you increased weight capacity at +(10*SkillLV)%.
If you stay outside the Place of the Sun, or Moon, or Stars for too long, this effect disappears. 
[Lv 1]: +10% 
[Lv 2]: +20% 
[Lv 3]: +30% 
[Lv 4]: +40% 
[Lv 5]: +50% 
[Lv 6]: +60% 
[Lv 7]: +70% 
[Lv 8]: +80% 
[Lv 9]: +90% 
[Lv 10]: +100%

SG_FUSION.name: Union of the Sun, Moon and Stars
SG_FUSION.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active 
Description: The power of this skill is unleashed when linked to a Soul Linker using the Star Gladiator Spirit (if not linked, the SP is wasted and nothing happens).
When linked, your movement speed is increased and all your attacks never miss and ignore Def, but you lose 2% of your HP every time you attack a monster and 8% HP every time you attack a player,
also if you attack a player when you only have 20% HP left, you will be killed instantly afterwards.

SL_ALCHEMIST.name: Alchemist Spirit
SL_ALCHEMIST.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Soullinks to Alchemists and Creators, giving them special buffs for the skill's duration.
- Increases effectiveness of Potion Pitcher by Soul Linker's BaseLV% (if the Soul Linker is BaseLV 68, Potion Pitcher heals +68%.
- Allows usage of Berserk Pitcher skill.
- Alchemists having Pharmacy LV 10 are allowed to use Twilight Alchemy I.
- If there is a Super Novice in the party the Alchemist is further allowed to use Twilight Alchemy II.
- If there is a TaeKwon in the party the Alchemist is further allowed to use Twilight Alchemy III.

AM_BERSERKPITCHER.name: Berserk Pitcher
AM_BERSERKPITCHER.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Throws a Berserk Potion at the target, that takes effect ignoring class restrictions, but the target still needs to be BaseLV 85 or more.

SL_MONK.name: Monk Spirit
SL_MONK.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Soullinks to Monks and Champions, giving them special buffs for the skill's duration.
- The Combo Finish attack becomes a 5x5 cell splash attack.
- SP Cost of combo skills is decreased.
- Allow SP regeneration in Critical Explosion state.

SL_STAR.name: Star Gladiator Spirit
SL_STAR.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Soullinks to Star Gladiators, allowing the usage of the "Union of the Sun, Moon and Stars" skill.

SL_SAGE.name: Sage Spirit
SL_SAGE.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Soullinks to Sages and Professors, allowing their Auto Spell Skill to always produce LV 10 Bolts if the Sage has learned that much in the Bolt Skill.

SL_CRUSADER.name: Crusader Spirit
SL_CRUSADER.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Soullinks to Crusaders and Paladins, making their Shield Boomerang never miss, do double the damage, and halving its after cast delay.

SL_SUPERNOVICE.name: Super Novice Spirit
SL_SUPERNOVICE.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Soullinks to Super Novices, giving them special buffs for the skill's duration.
- Super Novices above LV 90 will be temporarily able to equip ALL Upper/Middle/Lower headgears.
- Super Novices above LV 90 have 1% chance to 'erase' the death record - which means, the last 1% EXP loss will be recovered.
- Super Novices above LV 96 will be temporarily able to equip LV 4 Daggers, 1H Swords, Axes, Maces, and Staffs.

SL_KNIGHT.name: Knight Spirit
SL_KNIGHT.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Soullinks to Knights and Lord Knights, allowing those who have Two-Hand Quicken LV 10 to use One-Hand Quicken for the skill's duration.

SL_WIZARD.name: Wizard Spirit
SL_WIZARD.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Soullinks to Wizards and High Wizards, allowing them to cast all Gemstone requiring Skills without using them up (however, it still requires the Wizard to have at least one of the respective Gemstone) for the skill's duration.
When the Wizard has a "Crystal Fragment" while under this skill's effect, the item will be used, and any spells that were reflected back to you via Kaite will simply disappear instead of hitting you.

SL_PRIEST.name: Priest Spirit
SL_PRIEST.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Soullinks to Priests and High Priests, boosting the power of Holy Light by +400% but also increasing its SP Cost by +400% for the skill's duration.

SL_BARDDANCER.name: Bard and Dancer Spirits
SL_BARDDANCER.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Soullinks to Bards, Clowns, Dancers and Gypsies, giving them special buffs for the skill's duration.
- All singing/dancing skills affect the Bard/Dancer him/herself.
- While singing/dancing the walking speed is increased.
- A Whistle and Humming linked.
- Assassin Cross of Sunset and Please Don't Forget Me linked.
- A Poem of Bragi and Fortune's Kiss linked.
- The Apple of Idun and Service for You linked.
Linked means, if X skill is mastered, then Y skill can be used too while in "Spirit" mode.

SL_ROGUE.name: Rogue Spirit
SL_ROGUE.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Soullinks to Rogues and Stalkers, giving them special buffs for the skill's duration.
- Dispell no longer removes your buffs.
- Potions created by someone who is high on the alchemist rank have their effect increased.
- Str bonus from Tunnel Drive will last 5 minutes and walking speed will also increase.

SL_ASSASIN.name: Assassin Spirit
SL_ASSASIN.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Soullinks to Assassins and Assassins Cross, boosting their Sonic Blow by doubling its damage and halving the Cool Down for the skill's duration.
However, the bonuses are reduced to +25% bonus damage and no Cool Down bonus when in Siege Mode (WoE)

SL_BLACKSMITH.name: Blacksmith Spirit
SL_BLACKSMITH.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Soullinks to Blacksmiths and Whitesmiths, allowing them to use Full Adrenaline Rush if they have Adrenaline Rush LV5 for the skill's duration.

BS_ADRENALINE2.name: Full Adrenaline Rush
BS_ADRENALINE2.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Decreases character's attack delay with all weapons, including ranged by 30%. Decreases nearby party menbers attack delay with all weapons except ranged by 20%.
These two effects are supposed to stack with each other when used by more than one Smith in a party. Changing from a mace/axe to any other weapon (including bare fists) cancels the effect.
Does not stack with other skills that directly increase ASPD.

SL_HUNTER.name: Hunter Spirit
SL_HUNTER.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Soullinks to Hunters and Snipers, giving them special buffs for the skill's duration.
- Effectiveness of Beast Bane is increased by Hunters/Snipers Str.
- If Double Strafing is LV 10, a new skill, Beast Strafing, will be available.

SL_SOULLINKER.name: Soul Linker Spirit
SL_SOULLINKER.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Soullinks to other Soul Linkers (you can not link to yourself), allowing them to use "Ka- Type" skills on any other class, for the skill's duration.

SL_KAIZEL.name: Kaizel
SL_KAIZEL.description:
Max Level: 7
Skill Form: Active , Ka- Type 
Description: When you die, you are immediately resurrected with (10*SkillLV)% HP. After being resurrected Kaizel is dispelled but you have a 2 seconds lasting Kyrie Eleison buff.
This skill has no effect in guild siege / WoE. Can only be used on yourself, your spouse, children or other Soul Linkers; if used on someone else, the caster will be stunned for 0.5 sec (not reduced by Vit). 
[Lv 1]: 10% HP at res 
[Lv 2]: 20% HP at res 
[Lv 3]: 30% HP at res 
[Lv 4]: 40% HP at res 
[Lv 5]: 50% HP at res 
[Lv 6]: 60% HP at res 
[Lv 7]: 70% HP at res

SL_KAAHI.name: Kaahi
SL_KAAHI.description:
Max Level: 7
Skill Form: Active , Ka- Type 
Description: While this buff lasts, every time you are successfully attacked (skill attacks are not affected), it takes 5*SkillLV SP and heals 200*SkillLV HP. If you receive many attacks in a short time, the skill heal you for the total of the attacks (up to the heal limit).
Can only be used on yourself, your spouse, children or other Soul Linkers; if used on someone else, the caster will be stunned for 0.5 sec (not reduced by Vit). 
[Lv 1]: 5 SP taken, 200 HP healed 
[Lv 2]: 10 SP taken, 400 HP healed 
[Lv 3]: 15 SP taken, 600 HP healed 
[Lv 4]: 20 SP taken, 800 HP healed 
[Lv 5]: 25 SP taken, 1000 HP healed 
[Lv 6]: 30 SP taken, 1200 HP healed 
[Lv 7]: 35 SP taken, 1400 HP healed

SL_KAUPE.name: Kaupe
SL_KAUPE.description:
Max Level: 3
Skill Form: Active , Ka- Type 
Description: Allows you to absolutely evade an enemy attack. Evade all types of attacks from players (normal, skills, spells), but for area multi-hit spells like LoV only the 1st hit is dodged. It only dodge normal attacks from mobs, not their skills.
When you evade even once, the effect disappears. Can only be used on yourself, your spouse, children or other Soul Linkers; if used on someone else, the caster will be stunned for 0.5 sec (not reduced by Vit). 
[Lv 1]: 33% evade chance 
[Lv 2]: 66% evade chance 
[Lv 3]: 100% evade chance

SL_KAITE.name: Kaite
SL_KAITE.description:
Max Level: 7
Skill Form: Active , Ka- Type 
Description: Reflects all offensive magic and Heal back to the caster. It does not reflect status skills (those that make no damage) like Stone Curse.
LV 1-4 reflect once, LV 5-7 reflect twice before disappearing. If the Heal skill used on you gets reflected, the amount of healing done to the caster will be reduced. Will not reflect spells from Boss monsters and monsters above LV 80.
Can only be used on yourself, your spouse, children or other Soul Linkers; if used on someone else, the caster will be stunned for 0.5 sec (not reduced by Vit). 
[Lv 1]: 1 reflect 
[Lv 2]: 1 reflect 
[Lv 3]: 1 reflect 
[Lv 4]: 1 reflect 
[Lv 5]: 2 reflect 
[Lv 6]: 2 reflect 
[Lv 7]: 2 reflect

SL_KAINA.name: Kaina
SL_KAINA.description:
Max Level: 7
Skill Form: Passive , Ka- Type 
Description: Increases the power of Enjoyable Rest by (30+10*SkillLV)% and Maximum SP by 30*SkillLV. Also, if your BaseLV is above 70, Kaina reduce Estin, Estun, Esma's SP Cost by (3*SkillLV)%.
If BaseLV is above 80, (5*SkillLV)%. If BaseLV is above 90, (7*SkillLV)% for max of 49%. 
[Lv 1]: +40% Enj.Rest +30 Maximum SP 
[Lv 2]: +50% Enj.Rest +60 Maximum SP 
[Lv 3]: +60% Enj.Rest +90 Maximum SP 
[Lv 4]: +70% Enj.Rest +120 Maximum SP 
[Lv 5]: +80% Enj.Rest +150 Maximum SP 
[Lv 6]: +90% Enj.Rest +180 Maximum SP 
[Lv 7]: +100% Enj.Rest +210 Maximum SP

SL_STIN.name: Estin
SL_STIN.description:
Max Level: 7
Skill Form: Offensive , Es- Type 
Description: Magical skill that attacks only Small monsters. The affected monster is pushed back by 2 cells. When this is used on monsters that are not Small, it will do nearly no damage, but it will push them back.
When LV 7 version of this skill is used, you can use Esma for next 3 seconds.
"Es" type magic can only be used on monsters. If it is used on a player character, nothing happens and the caster will be stunned for 0.5 sec (not reduced by Vit). 
[Lv 1]: 10% Matk 
[Lv 2]: 20% Matk 
[Lv 3]: 30% Matk 
[Lv 4]: 40% Matk 
[Lv 5]: 50% Matk 
[Lv 6]: 60% Matk 
[Lv 7]: 70% Matk

SL_STUN.name: Estun
SL_STUN.description:
Max Level: 7
Skill Form: Offensive , Es- Type 
Description: Magical skill that attacks only Medium monsters. The affected monster is stunned for 2 sec. When this is used on Small monsters it won't stun them, but it will do full damage.
When LV 7 version of this skill is used, you can use Esma for next 3 seconds.
"Es" type magic can only be used on monsters. If it is used on a player character, nothing happens and the caster will be stunned for 0.5 sec (not reduced by Vit). 
[Lv 1]: 5% Matk 
[Lv 2]: 10% Matk 
[Lv 3]: 15% Matk 
[Lv 4]: 20% Matk 
[Lv 5]: 25% Matk 
[Lv 6]: 30% Matk 
[Lv 7]: 35% Matk

SL_SMA.name: Esma
SL_SMA.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Offensive , Es- Type 
Description: Strong Magic attack that changes its element depending on Warm Wind. This skill can also be used (within 3 seconds) after casting any kind of "Spirit"-type buffs.
"Es" type magic can only be used on monsters. If it is used on a player character, nothing happens and the caster will be stunned for 0.5 sec (not reduced by Vit). 
[Lv 1]: Damage: (40+BaseLV%) x 1 Missile 
[Lv 2]: Damage: (40+BaseLV%) x 2 Missiles 
[Lv 3]: Damage: (40+BaseLV%) x 3 Missiles 
[Lv 4]: Damage: (40+BaseLV%) x 4 Missiles 
[Lv 5]: Damage: (40+BaseLV%) x 5 Missiles 
[Lv 6]: Damage: (40+BaseLV%) x 6 Missiles 
[Lv 7]: Damage: (40+BaseLV%) x 7 Missiles 
[Lv 8]: Damage: (40+BaseLV%) x 8 Missiles 
[Lv 9]: Damage: (40+BaseLV%) x 9 Missiles 
[Lv 10]: Damage: (40+BaseLV%) x 10 Missiles

SL_SWOO.name: Eswoo
SL_SWOO.description:
Max Level: 7
Skill Form: Offensive , Es- Type 
Description: Makes the monster small, greatly reducing their walking speed, but the size attribute is not affected. If this is used on a Boss monster, this skill only lasts 1/5 of normal time.
If you use Eswoo on a monster that is already under this effect, it will cause you to be stunned for 10 seconds (reduced by Vit).
"Es" type magic can only be used on monsters. If it is used on a player character, nothing happens and the caster will be stunned for 0.5 sec (not reduced by Vit).

SL_SKE.name: Eske
SL_SKE.description:
Max Level: 3
Skill Form: Offensive , Es- Type 
Description: Increases monster's Atk by +300%, but halves their Def. You can cast Esma within 3 seconds after using Eske.
"Es" type magic can only be used on monsters. If it is used on a player character, nothing happens and the caster will be stunned for 0.5 sec (not reduced by Vit). 
[Lv 1]: Lasts 10 sec 
[Lv 2]: Lasts 20 sec 
[Lv 3]: Lasts 30 sec

SL_SKA.name: Eska
SL_SKA.description:
Max Level: 3
Skill Form: Offensive , Es- Type 
Description: Forces the monster to have a state similar to Monk Steel Body, but without blocking the skills. Mdef is set to 90 and Def change randomly every second, ASPD is not affected. Works on Boss and Miniboss type monsters.
"Es" type magic can only be used on monsters. If it is used on a player character, nothing happens and the caster will be stunned for 0.5 sec (not reduced by Vit). 
[Lv 1]: Lasts 10 sec 
[Lv 2]: Lasts 20 sec 
[Lv 3]: Lasts 30 sec

ST_PRESERVE.name: Preserve
ST_PRESERVE.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Prevents the automatic copying of skills through the Plagiarism skill for 10 minutes in order to preserve the last skill copied through Plagiarism.

ST_FULLSTRIP.name: Full Strip
ST_FULLSTRIP.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Casts all four Strip skills at the same time.
This skill's success rate increases if the caster has higher DEX than the target. 
[Lv 1]: 7% Chance 
[Lv 2]: 9% Chance 
[Lv 3]: 11% Chance 
[Lv 4]: 13% Chance 
[Lv 5]: 15% Chance

WS_WEAPONREFINE.name: Weapon Refine
WS_WEAPONREFINE.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Passive 
Description: Refines weapons to increase their grade.
Unlike weapon smithing, which is affected by DEX or LUK, this skill's success rate is affected by the caster's Job Level.
Whitesmith have same rate of success as Item Upgrade NPCs at Job Level 50, has 5% greater chance of success than Item Upgrade NPCs at Job Level 60, and have a 10% greater chance of success at Job Level 70.
If upgrade attempt fails, the weapon will be destroyed.
Level 1 Weapon require 1 Phracon.
Level 2 Weapon require 1 Emveretarcon.
Level 3-4 Weapon requires 1 Oridecon. 
[Lv 1]: +1 maximum refine level 
[Lv 2]: +2 maximum refine level 
[Lv 3]: +3 maximum refine level 
[Lv 4]: +4 maximum refine level 
[Lv 5]: +5 maximum refine level 
[Lv 6]: +6 maximum refine level 
[Lv 7]: +7 maximum refine level 
[Lv 8]: +8 maximum refine level 
[Lv 9]: +9 maximum refine level 
[Lv 10]: +10 maximum refine level

CR_SLIMPITCHER.name: Slim Potion Pitcher
CR_SLIMPITCHER.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Consumes 1 Slim Potion to heal all Party Members within a 7*7 cell area around the targeted spot. 
[Lv 1]: 110% efficiency, Red Slim Potion 
[Lv 2]: 120% efficiency, Red Slim Potion 
[Lv 3]: 130% efficiency, Red Slim Potion 
[Lv 4]: 140% efficiency, Red Slim Potion 
[Lv 5]: 150% efficiency, Red Slim Potion 
[Lv 6]: 160% efficiency, Yellow Slim Potion 
[Lv 7]: 170% efficiency, Yellow Slim Potion 
[Lv 8]: 180% efficiency, Yellow Slim Potion 
[Lv 9]: 190% efficiency, Yellow Slim Potion 
[Lv 10]: 200% efficiency, White Slim Potion

CR_FULLPROTECTION.name: Full Chemical Protection
CR_FULLPROTECTION.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Protects the targeted character with all four kinds of chemical protection.
Each cast requires 1 Glistening Coat. 
[Lv 1]: 120 sec 
[Lv 2]: 240 sec 
[Lv 3]: 360 sec 
[Lv 4]: 480 sec 
[Lv 5]: 600 sec

PA_SHIELDCHAIN.name: Shield Chain
PA_SHIELDCHAIN.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Physical attack 
Description: Enables the chance of striking an enemy 5 times with a Shield while in battle.
Accuracy Rate affects success chance and the Shield's weight and Upgrade status affects the amount of damage.
Shield Chain has 1 second cast delay and range of 4 cells.
Requires Shield. 
[Lv 1]: +30% Damage, HIT +20 
[Lv 2]: +60% Damage, HIT +20 
[Lv 3]: +90% Damage, HIT +20 
[Lv 4]: +120% Damage, HIT +20 
[Lv 5]: +150% Damage, HIT +20

HP_MANARECHARGE.name: Mana Recharge
HP_MANARECHARGE.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Passive 
Description: Decreases SP Cost of all your skills. 
[Lv 1]: SP Cost for all skills -4% 
[Lv 2]: SP Cost for all skills -8% 
[Lv 3]: SP Cost for all skills -12% 
[Lv 4]: SP Cost for all skills -16% 
[Lv 5]: SP Cost for all skills -20%

PF_DOUBLECASTING.name: Double Casting
PF_DOUBLECASTING.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: During the skill's duration, all Bolt-type spells (including Auto-Spells) have a chance of being casted a second time instantly. 
[Lv 1]: 40% Chance 
[Lv 2]: 50% Chance 
[Lv 3]: 60% Chance 
[Lv 4]: 70% Chance 
[Lv 5]: 80% Chance

HW_GANBANTEIN.name: Ganbantein
HW_GANBANTEIN.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Enables the chance of canceling ground targeting magic spell cast on a 3*3 cell area around the targeted spot.
This skill will cancel Land Protector on areas that have been enchanted by that skill.
This skill is unaffected by items or skills that remove Gemstone requirements.
Has 5 second cast delay.
Each cast requires 1 Blue Gemstone and Yellow Gemstone.

HW_GRAVITATION.name: Gravitation Field
HW_GRAVITATION.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Magical attack 
Description: Increases the gravity in a 5*5 AoE which will decrease the Attack Speed of enemies and cause continuous damage that ignore Defense.
When skill is active, the caster's movement and attacks are disabled.
This skill's effect on Attack and Movement Speeds does not apply to Boss monsters.
Each cast requires 1 Blue Gemstone.
Has 2 second cast delay. 
[Lv 1]: 400 Dmg/Sec, -5% ASPD, 5 sec 
[Lv 2]: 600 Dmg/Sec, -10% ASPD, 6 sec 
[Lv 3]: 800 Dmg/Sec, -15% ASPD, 7 sec 
[Lv 4]: 1000 Dmg/Sec, -20% ASPD, 8 sec 
[Lv 5]: 1200 Dmg/Sec, -25% ASPD, 9 sec

WS_CARTTERMINATION.name: Cart Termination
WS_CARTTERMINATION.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Physical attack 
Description: This skill is only enabled during Cart Boost status.
Spends a certain amount of zeny to smash Pushcart into an enemy with a chance of inflicting the Stun status.
The amount of this skill's damage is affected by the skill's level and the weight of items carried in the Pushcart. 
[Lv 1]: 600 zeny, 5% Stun chance 
[Lv 2]: 700 zeny, 10% Stun chance 
[Lv 3]: 800 zeny, 15% Stun chance 
[Lv 4]: 900 zeny, 20% Stun chance 
[Lv 5]: 1,000 zeny, 25% Stun chance 
[Lv 6]: 1,100 zeny, 30% Stun chance 
[Lv 7]: 1,200 zeny, 35% Stun chance 
[Lv 8]: 1,300 zeny, 40% Stun chance 
[Lv 9]: 1,400 zeny, 45% Stun chance 
[Lv 10]: 1,500 zeny, 50% Stun chance

WS_OVERTHRUSTMAX.name: Maximum Over Thrust
WS_OVERTHRUSTMAX.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Increases weapon damage by spending a certain amount of zeny.
Cannot be activated to anyone beside the caster.
Has 0.1% chance of destroying user's weapon every time when attacking. 
[Lv 1]: 20% damage, 3,000 zeny 
[Lv 2]: 40% damage, 3,500 zeny 
[Lv 3]: 60% damage, 4,000 zeny 
[Lv 4]: 80% damage, 4,000 zeny 
[Lv 5]: 100% damage, 5,000 zeny

CG_LONGINGFREEDOM.name: Longing for Freedom
CG_LONGINGFREEDOM.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Enables movement of Gypsy and Clown within an Ensemble skill's range, as well as the use of normal attacks and skills aside from Ensemble skills, while performing Ensemble skill.
The caster will continously spend SP through the duration of the performed Ensemble skill.
Longing for Freedom is cancelled when the Gypsy or Clown move out of the Ensemble skill's range, dies, or uses the Adaptation to Circumstances skill. 
[Lv 1]: 60% normal speed 
[Lv 2]: 70% normal speed 
[Lv 3]: 80% normal speed 
[Lv 4]: 90% normal speed 
[Lv 5]: 100% normal speed

CG_HERMODE.name: Wand of Hermode
CG_HERMODE.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: This skill can only be used near Warp Portal inside WoE maps during WoE times.
Hermode's Rod will cancel all positive status, aside from Berserk, from all friendly targets except for the caster, and will block any magic spells cast of this skill's targets.
No one including the caster can use any skills for the skill's duration, but Hermode's Rod is canceled upon leaving its effective range. 
[Lv 1]: 10 Sec duration 
[Lv 2]: 20 Sec duration 
[Lv 3]: 30 Sec duration 
[Lv 4]: 40 Sec duration 
[Lv 5]: 50 Sec duration

CG_TAROTCARD.name: Tarot Card of Fate
CG_TAROTCARD.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Cast a randomly chosen effect from one out of 14 tarot cards.
The level of this skill affects the chance of success. 
[Lv 1]: 8% Success Chance 
[Lv 2]: 16% Success Chance 
[Lv 3]: 24% Success Chance 
[Lv 4]: 32% Success Chance 
[Lv 5]: 40% Success Chance

CR_ACIDDEMONSTRATION.name: Acid Demonstration
CR_ACIDDEMONSTRATION.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Physical attack 
Description: Attacks an enemy by throwing both a Bottle Grenade and an Acid Bottle, inflicting an amount of damage that is affected by the skill's level, the caster's INT and the target's VIT.
This skill only inflicts 50% of its damage on other players, but it has the chance of damaging that player's weapon or armor.
Consumes 1 Bottle Grenade and 1 Acid Bottle. 
[Lv 1]: 1% chance of destroying 
[Lv 2]: 2% chance of destroying 
[Lv 3]: 3% chance of destroying 
[Lv 4]: 4% chance of destroying 
[Lv 5]: 5% chance of destroying 
[Lv 6]: 6% chance of destroying 
[Lv 7]: 7% chance of destroying 
[Lv 8]: 8% chance of destroying 
[Lv 9]: 9% chance of destroying 
[Lv 10]: 10% chance of destroying

CR_CULTIVATION.name: Plant Cultivation
CR_CULTIVATION.description:
Max Level: 2
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Initiates an attempt, which will have a 50% chance of success, to create a random type of Mushroom from a Mushroom Spore, or a Plant from a Stem.
This skill is disabled during WoE. 
[Lv 1]: Cultivate Mushrooms, Requires Mushroom Spore 
[Lv 2]: Cultivate Plants, Requires Stem

TK_MISSION.name: TaeKwon Mission
TK_MISSION.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active 
Description: This skill is disabled once a character changes to an advanced job, such as Star Gladiator or Soul Linker.
Activating this skill will display the current monster target for the Taekwon Mission.
Taekwon Boys and Girls will earn 1 Taekwon Mission Point by defeating 100 target monsters.
Fulfilling the 100 target monster quota will begin a new Taekwon Mission with a randomly chosen target.
Mini Boss and Boss monsters will never be chosen as targets.
Taekwon characters that achieve the Top 10 Taekwon Ranking by earning the most Taekwon Mission Points can string combos with the Tornado Kick, Roundhouse, Heel Drop, and Counter Kick skills.
Taekwon Rankers at Base Level 90 and above with have tripled MaxHP and MaxSP, and will be able to use all Taekwon Boy and Girl skills.

SL_HIGH.name: Rebirth Spirit
SL_HIGH.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Calls upon the spirits of the most powerful 1st Transcendent Class warriors ever so that they can lend their powers to their successors.
This skill will increase every Stat for friendly 1st Transcendent characters based on their Base Level, but each Stat bonus will not exceed +50. 
[Lv 1]: 460 SP, 150 sec duration 
[Lv 2]: 360 SP, 200 sec duration 
[Lv 3]: 260 SP, 250 sec duration 
[Lv 4]: 160 SP, 300 sec duration 
[Lv 5]: 60 SP, 350 sec duration

KN_ONEHAND.name: One-Hand Quicken
KN_ONEHAND.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Increases attack speed when using a One-Handed Sword class weapon.
Activating this skill cancels the effect of any potions that have a similar effect, but it is possible to use these potions after One Hand Quicken has been cast.
Unequipping Sword will cancel this skill's effect.

AM_TWILIGHT1.name: Twilight Alchemy I
AM_TWILIGHT1.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Make 200 attempts to create a White Potion every 0.005 seconds. This skill has the same success rate as the Pharmacy skill. If there are not enough ingredients to create all 200 at once, the skill will fail.
Check the Potion Creation Guide for the necessary ingredients.

AM_TWILIGHT2.name: Twilight Alchemy II
AM_TWILIGHT2.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Make 200 attempts to create a Condensed White Potion every 0.005 seconds. This skill has the same success rate as the Pharmacy skill. If there are not enough ingredients to create all 200 at once, the skill will fail.
Check the Condensed Potion Creation Guide for the necessary ingredients. 
Note: You need a Soul Linker and Super novice on your party to this skill to work.

AM_TWILIGHT3.name: Twilight Alchemy III
AM_TWILIGHT3.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Creates 100 Alcohol, 50 Acid Bottle and 50 Bottle Grenade. Each cast requires 50 Fabric, 50 Empty Bottle and enough materials to craft the produced items. If there are not enough ingredients to create them all at once, the skill will fail.
Check the Alcohol Creation Guide, Acid Bottle Creation Guide and Bottle Grenade Creation Guide for the necessary ingredients. 
Note: You need a Taekwon Boy on your party to this skill to work.

HT_POWER.name: Beast Strafing
HT_POWER.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Physical attack 
Description: Attacks by using a modified form of Double Strafe that was developed to cause extra damage to Brute monsters.
Caster's STR affects the amount of inflicted damage.

GS_GLITTERING.name: Flip the Coin
GS_GLITTERING.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Consumes 1 zeny to flip a coin.
If it lands showing heads, the caster will gain 1 coin, but if it shows tails, the caster will lose 1 coin.
The caster can have a maximum of 10 coins, and increasing this skill's level raises the success rate of flipping a coin that will show heads.
Gunslinger coins are displayed as glowing orbs around the caster.

GS_FLING.name: Fling
GS_FLING.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Physical attack 
Description: Spends coins to fling them at an enemy to inflict damage and reduce its DEF.
Fling can consume up to 5 coins in a single cast, and will reduce more of an enemy's DEF if more coins are spent.

GS_TRIPLEACTION.name: Triple Action
GS_TRIPLEACTION.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Physical attack 
Description: Shoots an enemy 3 times in one attack.
Consumes 1 coin.

GS_BULLSEYE.name: Bull's Eye
GS_BULLSEYE.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Physical attack 
Description: Inflicts 500% damage to Demihuman and Brute monsters.
Bull's Eye has a 0.1% chance to inflict Coma status on all enemies except Boss monsters.
Consumes 1 coin.

GS_MADNESSCANCEL.name: Madness Canceller
GS_MADNESSCANCEL.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Activates Madness Canceller in which the caster is immobilized, but adds 100 ATK and 20% ASPD.
Madness Canceller has 15 second duration and cannot be used with Adjustment skill.
Consumes 4 coins.

GS_ADJUSTMENT.name: Adjustment
GS_ADJUSTMENT.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Activates Adjustment status in which caster has +30 Flee and receives 20% less damage from ranged physical attacks, but has -30 HIT.
This skill has a 30 second duration, and cannot be used together with the Madness Canceller skill.
Consumes 2 coins.

GS_INCREASING.name: Increasing Accuracy
GS_INCREASING.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Adds +20 HIT, +4 DEX, and +4 AGI for 1 minute duration.
Consumes 4 coins.

GS_MAGICALBULLET.name: Magical Bullet
GS_MAGICALBULLET.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Physical attack 
Description: Fires a magic shot that does not use any bullets, inflicting an amount of Ghost elemental damage equal to the caster's Atk + MATK.
Consumes 1 coin.

GS_CRACKER.name: Cracker
GS_CRACKER.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Fires a bullet that will Stun an enemy.
The nearer the target is to the caster, the greater the chance of inflicting the Stun status.
Consumes 1 coin.

GS_SINGLEACTION.name: Single Action
GS_SINGLEACTION.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Passive 
Description: Essential Gunslinger skill that enables Gunslinger to fire their weapon more quickly and accurately. 
[Lv 1]: Hit +2, ASPD +1% 
[Lv 2]: Hit +4, ASPD +1%

GS_CHAINACTION.description:

Raising this skill's level increases the rate of firing double shots.

Requires Revolver class weapon.

GS_TRACKING.name: Tracking
GS_TRACKING.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Physical attack

GS_RAPIDSHOWER.description:

Skill Form: Physical attack

[Lv 2]: 600% damage

NJ_KUNAI.description:
Max Level: 5

NJ_HUUMA.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Physical attack

NJ_ZENYNAGE.description:

Damage is reduced against Boss monsters and in PvP area.
This skill has 5 sec after cast delay.

Skill Form: Active 
Description: Flips tatami to cause the 4*4 area around the caster to ignore long range physical damage for 3 seconds.
Has a chance to damage and push enemies 3 cells backward if they are within the skill's attack range.
This skill has 3 seconds after cast delay. 
[Lv 1]: 1 cell range, 110% damage 
[Lv 2]: 1 cell range, 120% damage 
[Lv 3]: 2 cells range, 130% damage 
[Lv 4]: 2 cells range, 140% damage 
[Lv 5]: 3 cells range, 150% damage

NJ_KASUMIKIRI.name: Haze Slash
NJ_KASUMIKIRI.description:

[Lv 2]: 120% damage

This skill instantly moves the caster to a targeted cell, ignoring obstacles in the caster's way.

[Lv 2]: 6 cells range 
[Lv 3]: 7 cells range

[Lv 5]: 9 cells range

NJ_KIRIKAGE.description:

Strikes a target with an attack whose range is equal to the caster's Shadow Leap range. Casting this skill will cancel Hiding status.

NJ_SUITON.description:
