Further the enemy is from you, higher your Atk will be, but also increase your casting time of this skill.

CR_SHRINK.name: Shrink
CR_SHRINK.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active 
Description: This skill activates when used and deactivates if used again or the duration expires.
If you successfully defend using Auto Guard, there is a (5*Auto Guard LV)% chance to push the defended enemy 2 cells away.

AS_SONICACCEL.name: Sonic Acceleration
AS_SONICACCEL.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Passive 
Description: Increases the Sonic Blow Hit by +50 and Damage by +10%

AS_VENOMKNIFE.name: Throw Venom Knife
AS_VENOMKNIFE.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Physical attack 
Description: Throws a poisoned Dagger with a high chance of poisoning the target. This Skill requires you to have a Dagger equipped and uses up this item when executed.

RG_CLOSECONFINE.name: Close Confine
RG_CLOSECONFINE.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active 
Description: For 10 seconds, you grab a single enemy, preventing you and the target to move. While you grab onto someone, you will have +10 bonus to Flee Rate.
If either the victim or you die, or should any of them teleport away, this skill is cancelled.

WZ_SIGHTBLASTER.name: Sight Blaster
WZ_SIGHTBLASTER.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Summons a fireball that circles around you and hits enemies attempting to attack you at close range.
When an enemy steps next to you, he will be hit by a Matk Fire Element attack and pushed back. The Fireball disappears after hitting an enemy.

SA_CREATECON.name: Create Elemental Converter
SA_CREATECON.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Create an "Elemental Converter" item.
Recipes:
- Flame Elemental Converter:
3 Scorpion Tail + 1 Blank Scroll
- Seismic Elemental Converter:
3 Horn + 1 Blank Scroll
- Lightning Elemental Converter:
3 Rainbow Shell + 1 Blank Scroll
- Frost Elemental Converter:
3 Snail's Shell + 1 Blank Scroll

SA_ELEMENTWATER.name: Elemental Change (Water)
SA_ELEMENTWATER.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Change the target monster's elemental element to Water, uses up a Frost Elemental Converter.

HT_PHANTASMIC.name: Phantasmic Arrow
HT_PHANTASMIC.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Physical attack 
Description: Launches an arrow of illusion from your bow. It has 150% damage, and if it hits the enemy, it pushes them back 3 cells. You can use this skill even if you have no Arrows equipped.

BA_PANGVOICE.name: Pang Voice
BA_PANGVOICE.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active 
Description: You scream out at a single target, causing the 'Confusion' status ailment. Does not work against Boss monsters.

DC_WINKCHARM.name: Wink of Charm
DC_WINKCHARM.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Charm a target by sending them a sexy wink. For those 10 seconds, the target monster will not attack you.
The higher your level is when compared to the monster, the higher the chance of this skill working.
If this skill is used on a player, it has low chance of causing the 'Confusion' status ailment.
This skill only works on DemiHuman, Angel and Demon type monsters and, obviously, does not work against Boss monsters.

BS_UNFAIRLYTRICK.name: Unfair Trick
BS_UNFAIRLYTRICK.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Passive 
Description: Reduces the Zeny cost of Mammonite by 10%.

BS_GREED.name: Greed
BS_GREED.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active 
Description: When you use this skill, all items within 2 cells of the Blacksmith will straight go to his inventory.
It is not possible to use this skill during the War of Emperium or in PvP.
Do note this skill does not bypass the order of who gets an item first, so you cannot use this skill to snatch an item when another player has the first priority over the item dropped.

PR_REDEMPTIO.name: Redemptio
PR_REDEMPTIO.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Kill yourself (and receive EXP penalty), but revive all other dead party members near you.
All revived players will have recovered 50% of their HP. The more party members you revive, the less EXP penalty you get.
Casting time is 4 seconds, and this skill ignores Dex for casting time reduction. Will not work if your current EXP is below 1%.
Editor's Note: I speculate the EXP loss to be (1-Resurrected Members)*0.01%

MO_KITRANSLATION.name: Ki Translation
MO_KITRANSLATION.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Transfer one of your Spirit Spheres to another party member. Uses up 1 Spirit Sphere.

MO_BALKYOUNG.name: Ki Explosion
MO_BALKYOUNG.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Physical attack 
Description: Focus your inner energies and attack an enemy to deal damage and push them away.
The targeted enemy receives 300% damage damage, and nearby monsters will be pushed away 2 cells and stunned for 2 sec.
Drains a small amount of HP per use.

SA_ELEMENTGROUND.name: Elemental Change (Earth)
SA_ELEMENTGROUND.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Change the target monster's elemental element to Earth, uses up a Seismic Elemental Converter.

SA_ELEMENTFIRE.name: Elemental Change (Fire)
SA_ELEMENTFIRE.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Change the target monster's elemental element to Fire, uses up a Flame Elemental Converter.

SA_ELEMENTWIND.name: Elemental Change (Wind)
SA_ELEMENTWIND.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Change the target monster's elemental element to Wind, uses up a Lightning Elemental Converter.

RETURN_TO_ELDICASTES.name: Return To El Dicastes
RETURN_TO_ELDICASTES.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Warps you to the town of El Dicastes.

HLIF_HEAL.name: Touch of Heal
HLIF_HEAL.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: This works exactly like the Acolyte's Heal skill, healing the target HP. The healed amount depends only on the Homunculus's LV and Int. 
Each cast requires 1 Condensed Red Potion.

HLIF_AVOID.name: Emergency Avoid
HLIF_AVOID.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Helps avoiding dangerous situations by temporarily increasing player's and Homunculus's movement speed.
MoveSpeed Bonus | Lasting Time 
[Lv 1]: 10% - 40 Sec 
[Lv 2]: 20% - 35 Sec 
[Lv 3]: 30% - 30 Sec 
[Lv 4]: 40% - 25 Sec 
[Lv 5]: 50% - 20 Sec

HLIF_BRAIN.name: Brain Surgery
HLIF_BRAIN.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Passive 
Description: By training the Lif you increase her Maximum SP and SP regeneration rate. This also increases the effect of the Touch of Heal skill.
SP Increase / SP Regen Bonus / HT Bonus 
[Lv 1]: 1% / 3% / 2% 
[Lv 2]: 2% / 6% / 4% 
[Lv 3]: 3% / 9% / 6% 
[Lv 4]: 4% / 12% / 8% 
[Lv 5]: 5% / 15% / 10%

HLIF_CHANGE.name: Mental Change
HLIF_CHANGE.description:
Max Level: 3
Skill Form: Active 
Description: For the skill's duration, Homunculus's Maximum HP and SP are switched. Non-skill attacks are increased by the Lif's Matk value. Upon activation, Homunculus's HP is fully healed. After the skill's duration has ended, HP and SP are set to 10. 
[Lv 1]: 60 sec/ 600 sec 
[Lv 2]: 180 sec/ 900 sec 
[Lv 3]: 300 sec/ 1200 sec

HAMI_CASTLE.name: Castling
HAMI_CASTLE.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Instantaenuously switch the location of the player and the Homunculus. The monsters that were attacking the player will now attack the Homunculus instead.
[Lv 1]: - 20% chance
[Lv 2]: - 40% chance
[Lv 3]: - 60% chance
[Lv 4]: - 80% chance
[Lv 5]: - 100% chance

HAMI_DEFENCE.name: Defense
HAMI_DEFENCE.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Temporarily increase Def of the Homunculus and the player. 
[Lv 1]: +2 for 40 sec 
[Lv 2]: +4 for 35 sec 
[Lv 3]: +6 for 30 sec 
[Lv 4]: +8 for 25 sec 
[Lv 5]: +10 for 20 sec

HAMI_SKIN.name: Adamantium Skin
HAMI_SKIN.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Passive 
Description: Pernamently increase the Def, Maximum HP and HP regeneration rate of the Homunculus.
HP Bonus / Regen Bonus / Def Bonus 
[Lv 1]: + 2% / 5% / 4 
[Lv 2]: + 4% / 10% / 8 
[Lv 3]: + 6% / 15% / 12 
[Lv 4]: + 8% / 20% / 16 
[Lv 5]: + 10% / 25% / 20

HAMI_BLOODLUST.name: Blood Lust
HAMI_BLOODLUST.description:
Max Level: 3
Skill Form: Active 
Description: For the spells duration, Homunculus's damage is increased and every attack has a certain chance to leech 20% of the damage as HP. 
[Lv 1]: +130% damage, 3% leech chance 
[Lv 2]: +140% damage, 6% leech chance 
[Lv 3]: +150% damage, 9% leech chance

HFLI_MOON.name: Moonlight
HFLI_MOON.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Physical attack 
Description: Order Filir to attack the target with its beak, hitting the target for SkillLV times with a damage bonus of (10+110*SkillLV)%.
Times Hit | Total Damage 
[Lv 1]: - 1 - 220% 
[Lv 2]: - 2 - 330% 
[Lv 3]: - 2 - 440% 
[Lv 4]: - 2 - 550% 
[Lv 5]: - 3 - 660%

HFLI_FLEET.name: Fleet Move
HFLI_FLEET.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Temporarily increase ASPD by +(3*SkillLV)% and Attack Power by (105+5*SkillLV)% of Filir (maybe the increase is only 5+5*SkillLV?).
ASPD Bonus | Damage Bonus | Lasting Time / After-cast Delay 
[Lv 1]: - 3% - 110% - 60 sec / 60 sec 
[Lv 2]: - 6% - 115% - 55 sec / 70 sec 
[Lv 3]: - 9% - 120% - 50 sec / 80 sec 
[Lv 4]: - 12% - 125% - 45 sec / 90 sec 
[Lv 5]: - 15% - 130% - 40 sec / 120 sec

HFLI_SPEED.name: Over Speed
HFLI_SPEED.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Temporarily increase the Flee Rate of your Homunculus by 10+10*SkillLV.
Flee Bonus | Lasting Time / Cool Down 
[Lv 1] - 20 - 60 sec / 60 sec 
[Lv 2] - 30 - 55 sec / 70 sec 
[Lv 3] - 40 - 50 sec / 80 sec 
[Lv 4] - 50 - 45 sec / 90 sec 
[Lv 5] - 60 - 40 sec / 120 sec

HFLI_SBR44.name: S.B.R.44
HFLI_SBR44.description:
Max Level: 3
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Lower your Filir's intimacy level in exchange for high damage to a single target. 
[Lv 1]: 100 * Intimacy Damage 
[Lv 2]: 200 * Intimacy Damage 
[Lv 3]: 300 * Intimacy Damage

HVAN_CAPRICE.name: Caprice
HVAN_CAPRICE.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Magical attack 
Description: Use one of the Bolt-type spells. Homunculus decides randomly which one it uses, you can not influence its decision.
The skill level used for the random Bolt-type spell depends on current skill level of Caprice.
LV | Effect 
[Lv 1]: LV 1 Bolt 
[Lv 2]: LV 2 Bolt 
[Lv 3]: LV 3 Bolt 
[Lv 4]: LV 4 Bolt 
[Lv 5]: LV 5 Bolt

HVAN_CHAOTIC.name: Chaotic Benediction
HVAN_CHAOTIC.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: It randomly uses Heal up to the current Chaotic Benediction skill level to either one of the following: Player (you), enemy that you are attacking or Homunculus itself at following success rate.
(Enemy / Homunculus / Player) 
[Lv 1]: Heal (1) - 50% / 20% / 30% 
[Lv 2]: Heal (1 ~ 2) - 40% / 50% / 10% 
[Lv 3]: Heal (1 ~ 3) - 25% / 25% / 50% 
[Lv 4]: Heal (1 ~ 4) - 36% / 60% / 4% 
[Lv 5]: Heal (1 ~ 5) - 33% / 34% / 33%

HVAN_INSTRUCT.name: Change Instruction
HVAN_INSTRUCT.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Passive 
Description: Increase your Homunculus's Int and Str.
Also helps on creating potions, the bonus is +1% per skill level if the Homunculus is active. 
[Lv 1]: +1 Int/ +1 Str 
[Lv 2]: +2 Int/ +1 Str 
[Lv 3]: +2 Int/ +3 Str 
[Lv 4]: +4 Int/ +4 Str 
[Lv 5]: +5 Int/ +4 Str

HVAN_EXPLOSION.name: Bio Explosion
HVAN_EXPLOSION.description:
Max Level: 3
Skill Form: Physical attack 
Description: Homunculus self destructs and inflicts defense ignoring damage on everything within a 9x9 cells around it. The damage is based on the Homunculus Maximum HP, and after the attack, its intimacy is reduced to 1. 
[Lv 1]: Explosion damage: Maximum HP*1 
[Lv 2]: Explosion damage: Maximum HP*1.5 
[Lv 3]: Explosion damage: Maximum HP*2

MS_BASH.name: Bash
MS_BASH.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Physical attack 
Description: A melee attack with Atk equal to (100+30*SkillLV)%. There is a Hit bonus of 5*SkillLV. If the character has the Fatal Blow skill as well, levels 6-10 will add a chance to Stun of 5%*(Bash SkillLV - 5) plus a bonus depending on BaseLV. 
[Lv 1]: Atk 130%, +5% Accuracy 
[Lv 2]: Atk 160%, +10% Accuracy 
[Lv 3]: Atk 190%, +15% Accuracy 
[Lv 4]: Atk 220%, +20% Accuracy 
[Lv 5]: Atk 250%, +25% Accuracy 
[Lv 6]: Atk 280%, +30% Accuracy 
[Lv 7]: Atk 310%, +35% Accuracy 
[Lv 8]: Atk 340%, +40% Accuracy 
[Lv 9]: Atk 370%, +45% Accuracy 
[Lv 10]: Atk 400%, +50% Accuracy

MS_MAGNUM.name: Magnum Break
MS_MAGNUM.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Physical attack 
Description: 5x5 cells, Fire element splash attack with Atk of (100+20*SkillLV)% and a +10*SkillLV bonus to HIT. Enemies hit by the attack are pushed back 2 cells. Drains 15 HP per use, but cannot kill character.
After usage, it adds a 20% Fire-elemental bonus to Atk that lasts for 10 seconds. After the cast the attack sequence is not interrupted. 
[Lv 1]: Atk 120%, +10 Hit 
[Lv 2]: Atk 140%, +20 Hit 
[Lv 3]: Atk 160%, +30 Hit 
[Lv 4]: Atk 180%, +40 Hit 
[Lv 5]: Atk 200%, +50 Hit 
[Lv 6]: Atk 220%, +60 Hit 
[Lv 7]: Atk 240%, +70 Hit 
[Lv 8]: Atk 260%, +80 Hit 
[Lv 9]: Atk 280%, +90 Hit 
[Lv 10]: Atk 300%, +100 Hit

MS_BOWLINGBASH.name: Bowling Bash
MS_BOWLINGBASH.description:
Skill Form: Physical attack 
Description: Hits one enemy with an Atk of (100+40*SkillLV)%. The enemy is knocked back up to 5 cells. If that enemy hits any other enemies, then the hit becomes a 3x3 cell melee splash attack at that point with additional damage to these secondary targets. During the Cast Time character's Def is reduced to 2/3. 
[Lv 1]: 140% damage, Knock back 1 cell 
[Lv 2]: 180% damage, Knock back 1 cell 
[Lv 3]: 220% damage, Knock back 2 cell 
[Lv 4]: 260% damage, Knock back 2 cell 
[Lv 5]: 300% damage, Knock back 3 cell 
[Lv 6]: 340% damage, Knock back 3 cell 
[Lv 7]: 380% damage, Knock back 4 cell 
[Lv 8]: 420% damage, Knock back 4 cell 
[Lv 9]: 460% damage, Knock back 5 cell 
[Lv 10]: 500% damage, Knock back 5 cell

MS_PARRYING.name: Parry
MS_PARRYING.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active 
Description: You automatically block attacks with a success chance of (5*SkillLV)%. This allows you to Auto Guard melee and ranged attacks with your two-handed sword.
This Skill also enables you to parry the following skills: Bash, Bowling Bash, Pierce, Spiral Pierce, Brandish Spear, Spear Boomerang, Shield Boomerang, Grand Cross, Asura Strike, Soul Breaker, Double Strafing, Arrow Shower and Investigate.
When you block you cannot attack (but unlike Auto Guard, there is no delay). Use this when you get mobbed. Two Hand sword needed 
[Lv 1]: Block Chance 5%, 15 Sec 
[Lv 2]: Block Chance 10%, 20 Sec 
[Lv 3]: Block Chance 15%, 25 Sec 
[Lv 4]: Block Chance 20%, 30 Sec 
[Lv 5]: Block Chance 25%, 35 Sec 
[Lv 6]: Block Chance 30%, 40 Sec 
[Lv 7]: Block Chance 35%, 45 Sec 
[Lv 8]: Block Chance 40%, 50 Sec 
[Lv 9]: Block Chance 45%, 55 Sec 
[Lv 10]: Block Chance 50%, 60 Sec

MS_REFLECTSHIELD.name: Reflect Shield
MS_REFLECTSHIELD.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Returns some damage dealt to you back to the enemy. Melee attacks only. Reflected Damage is (10+3*SkillLV)% of received damage. Requires an equipped shield and ignores size modifications. 
[Lv 1]: 13% damage Returned 
[Lv 2]: 16% damage Returned 
[Lv 3]: 19% damage Returned 
[Lv 4]: 22% damage Returned 
[Lv 5]: 25% damage Returned 
[Lv 6]: 28% damage Returned 
[Lv 7]: 31% damage Returned 
[Lv 8]: 34% damage Returned 
[Lv 9]: 37% damage Returned 
[Lv 10]: 40% damage Returned

MS_BERSERK.name: Berserk
MS_BERSERK.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Requires you to have a JobLV of at least 50. It triples your HP and replenishes them (to the now tripled maximum), doubles your Damage, increases your ASPD by 30%,
increases your movement speed (does not stack with other increase except Peco Peco), gives the Endure effect at no further cost but halves your Flee Rate and sets ALL Def AND Mdef to 0 for the skill's duration.
It also drains 5% of your current HP every 15 seconds. You cannot chat (chat mute), change equips, use any healing items or receive any heals while this skill is in effect.
You do not regain HP and SP naturally for 5 minutes after the skill ends (you can be healed or use items though). The Skill cancels out if your HP drops to 100 or below. Can be used during Guild Siege.

MA_DOUBLE.name: Double Strafing
MA_DOUBLE.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Physical attack 
Description: Ranged attack, that fires two arrows and hits with an Atk of (180+20*SkillLV)%. Requires an equipped bow. Only 1 arrow is consumed. 
[Lv 1]: 200% damage 
[Lv 2]: 220% damage 
[Lv 3]: 240% damage 
[Lv 4]: 260% damage 
[Lv 5]: 280% damage 
[Lv 6]: 300% damage 
[Lv 7]: 320% damage 
[Lv 8]: 340% damage 
[Lv 9]: 360% damage 
[Lv 10]: 380% damage

MA_SHOWER.name: Arrow shower
MA_SHOWER.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Physical attack 
Knoc Back: 2 cells 
Description: 5x5 cells, ranged splash attack with an Atk of (75+5*SkillLV)%. Enemies hit by the attack are pushed back 2 cells. Requires an equipped bow. Only 1 arrow is consumed. 
[Lv 1]: 160% damage 
[Lv 2]: 170% damage 
[Lv 3]: 180% damage 
[Lv 4]: 190% damage 
[Lv 5]: 200% damage 
[Lv 6]: 210% damage 
[Lv 7]: 220% damage 
[Lv 8]: 230% damage 
[Lv 9]: 240% damage 
[Lv 10]: 250% damage

MA_SKIDTRAP.name: Skid Trap
MA_SKIDTRAP.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active, Trap 
Knock Back: (5 + (Skill Level*1) 
Description: A Skid Trap is a trap that activates when someone comes within SkillLV cells of it. When activated, the affected target is pushed back 5+SkillLV cells (10 cells if the skill is at level 5).
Skid Traps are invisible, but any player who can see the Hunter laying the trap will be able to see the trap until they move out of sight of it. Use of any Hide revealing skill will reveal the trap. This trap will affect Players in PVP zones, including the user.
Does not work on Boss and Plant monsters. If not tripped by the end of the duration, the Skid Trap will turn back into a Trap item on the floor and can be reclaimed. 
[Lv 1]: Sliding Range 6 cells, Setting Time 300 secs 
[Lv 2]: Sliding Range 7 cells, Setting Time 240 secs 
[Lv 3]: Sliding Range 8 cells, Setting Time 180 secs 
[Lv 4]: Sliding Range 9 cells, Setting Time 120 secs 
[Lv 5]: Sliding Range 10 cells, Setting Time 60 secs

MA_LANDMINE.name: Land Mine
MA_LANDMINE.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active, Trap 
Description: A Land Mine is a visible trap that explodes when stepped on, hitting the monster or player (in PvP only) that triggered it for [(Dex+75)*(1+Int/100)*SkillLV] damage.
This skill ignores Def and Mdef and damage modification cards for size and family, but not elemental element. There is also a (5*SkillLV+30)% chance to stun targets for 5 seconds. This trap will affect Players in PVP zones, including the user.
If not tripped by the end of the duration, the Land Mine will turn back into a Trap item on the floor and can be reclaimed. 
[Lv 1]: Atk 50%, Setting Time 200secs 
[Lv 2]: Atk 75%, Setting Time 160secs 
[Lv 3]: Atk 100%, Setting Time 120secs 
[Lv 4]: Atk 125%, Setting Time 80secs 
[Lv 5]: Atk 150%, Setting Time 40secs

MA_SANDMAN.name: Sandman
MA_SANDMAN.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active, Trap 
Description: A Sandman is a trap that activates when stepped on. All targets in a 3x3 area around the trap will have an (40+10*SkillLV)% chance of being affected by "Sleep" (duration depends on SkillLV).
A Sandman is invisible, but any player who can see the Hunter laying the trap will be able to see the trap until they move out of sight of it. Use of any invisibility revealing skill will reveal the trap. This trap will affect Players in PVP zones, including the user.
If not tripped by the end of the duration, the Sandman will turn back into a Trap item on the floor and can be reclaimed. 
[Lv 1]: Setting Time 150sec 50% Sleep Chance 
[Lv 2]: Setting Time 120sec 60% Sleep Chance 
[Lv 3]: Setting Time 90sec 70% Sleep Chance 
[Lv 4]: Setting Time 60sec 80% Sleep Chance 
[Lv 5]: Setting Time 30sec 90% Sleep Chance

MA_FREEZINGTRAP.name: Freezing Trap
MA_FREEZINGTRAP.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active, Trap 
Description: A Freezing Trap is a trap that activates when stepped on. When activated, it will hit all in the area with a Frost Nova style attack. Damage is (25+25*SkillLV)% of your normal Atk.
Chance to Freeze is Unknown and does not work against Boss monsters. Freezing Traps are invisible, but any player who can see the Hunter laying the trap will be able to see the trap until they move out of sight of it. Use of any invisibility revealing skill will reveal the trap. This trap will affect Players in PVP zones, including the user.
If not tripped by the end of the duration, the Freezing Trap will turn back into a Trap item on the floor and can be reclaimed. 
[Lv 1]: Setting Time 150secs 
[Lv 2]: Setting Time 120secs 
[Lv 3]: Setting Time 90secs 
[Lv 4]: Setting Time 60secs 
[Lv 5]: Setting Time 30secs

MA_REMOVETRAP.name: Remove Trap
MA_REMOVETRAP.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Turns one set trap back into a Trap item. You only get one trap even if you needed two for setting it. Can be used with an Ankle Snare that has already caught a target, but in this case you will not get a Trap item. Only works with your own traps.

MA_CHARGEARROW.name: Charge Arrow
MA_CHARGEARROW.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Physical attack 
Description: Ranged attack at 150% damage. The target is pushed back 6 cells. Only 1 arrow is consumed.

MA_SHARPSHOOTING.name: Sharpshooting
MA_SHARPSHOOTING.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Physical attack 
Description: Arrow attack that will affect every enemy in a 3 cell wide corridor along its flight path up to its maximum range of 14 cells. The corridor is a straight line between the caster and its target.
If the target is closer than 14 cells, the corridor will continue up to its full length. It affects all enemies along this path with an increased Atk (by 50% per SkillLV) and a +20 bonus to CRIT. 
[Lv 1]: +20 CRIT, +50% damage 
[Lv 2]: +20 CRIT, +100% damage 
[Lv 3]: +20 CRIT, +150% damage 
[Lv 4]: +20 CRIT, +200% damage 
[Lv 5]: +20 CRIT, +250% damage

ML_PIERCE.name: Pierce
ML_PIERCE.description:
Skill Form: Offensive
Description: Hits for an Atk of (100+10*SkillLV)%. Number of hits depends on the size of the target. Small = 1, Medium = 2, Large = 3. Players are considered to be medium. 
[Small]: 1 Hit 
[Medium]: 2 Hits 
[Big]: 3 Hits

ML_BRANDISH.name: Brandish Spear
ML_BRANDISH.description: Description: An area attack with an Atk of (100+20*SkillLV)%.

ML_SPIRALPIERCE.name: Spiral Pierce
ML_SPIRALPIERCE.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Physical attack 
Description: Extend your spear, and spin it in a spiral fashion to increase overall damage and ability to pierce. A more powerful version of Pierce which ignores Def and Vit Def and also stun-locks your opponent for 3 sec.
Damage is (100+50*SkillLV)% damage. The attack is 5 hits with the damage divided evenly between the hits. However you can increase damage further by increasing the weight of your weapon (upgrades count too! LV 1 weapons +10/upgrade, LV 2 weapons +15/upgrade, LV 3 weapons +25/upgrade).
Although damage will increase with better skill level, so will the Cast Time / Cool Down. Aura Blade does not add damage to this skill. Recent tests revealed the following (rather complex) formula:
[(80% of weapons weight times (100%+level*50%) + (round.down(Str/10^2) + Upgrade Damage) * size modifier (small 125%, medium 100%, large 75%)) * card factors (+20% and such) * element factors ]* 5 hits 
[Lv 1]: 150% damage per attack 
[Lv 2]: 200% damage per attack 
[Lv 3]: 250% damage per attack 
[Lv 4]: 300% damage per attack 
[Lv 5]: 350% damage per attack

ML_DEFENDER.name: Defender
ML_DEFENDER.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Decreases the Atk of ranged attacks against the caster by (5+15*SkillLV)%, but also lowers ASPD by (25-5*SkillLV)% and walking speed by 1/3 while active.
The higher the level the lower the values, up to SkillLV 5 which has no speed reductions.
Can be shared with party members when the Devotion skill is casted on them, but the movement reduction will affect them too. Caster must have a shield equipped. 
[Lv 1]: -20% damage, -20% ASPD 
[Lv 2]: -35% damage, -15% ASPD 
[Lv 3]: -50% damage, -10% ASPD 
[Lv 4]: -65% damage, -5% ASPD 
[Lv 5]: -80% damage, no ASPD reduction

ML_AUTOGUARD.name: Auto Guard
ML_AUTOGUARD.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Gives you the ability to completely block attacks. Requires an equipped Shield. When you block an attack, you will be unable to move for 0.3 seconds for SkillLV 1-5. SkillLV 6-9 delays your movement for 0.2 sec and SkillLV 10 for 0.1 sec. 
[Lv 1]: 5% Chance, 0.3 delay 
[Lv 2]: 10% Chance, 0.3 delay 
[Lv 3]: 14% Chance, 0.3 delay 
[Lv 4]: 18% Chance, 0.3 delay 
[Lv 5]: 21% Chance, 0.3 delay 
[Lv 6]: 24% Chance, 0.2 delay 
[Lv 7]: 26% Chance, 0.2 delay 
[Lv 8]: 28% Chance, 0.2 delay 
[Lv 9]: 29% Chance, 0.2 delay 
[Lv 10]: 30% Chance, 0.1 delay

ML_DEVOTION.name: Devotion
ML_DEVOTION.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Protect party members by taking the full damage that they are receiving. They must be in range to benefit from this, once they leave the skill is canceled and needs to be recasted.
Damage taken is based on the Def of the person who gets hit, not the Crusader that takes the hit.
If the caster has any self casted, class native enhancements on him, e.g. Endure (Endure transfer is disabled in WoE), Providence or Reflect Shield, the party member(s) will share these benefits, too.
This skill cannot be used on other Crusaders. The level difference between the caster and the target must be equal or less than 10 (within normal EXP share range).
The number of possible protected party members is 1*SkillLV. Should the HP of Crusader drop below 25%, Devotion will be canceled. 
[Lv 1]: 30 sec, 1 Player 
[Lv 2]: 45 sec, 2 Players 
[Lv 3]: 60 sec, 3 Players 
[Lv 4]: 75 sec, 4 Players 
[Lv 5]: 90 sec, 5 Players

MER_MAGNIFICAT.name: Magnificat
MER_MAGNIFICAT.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Double the caster and party members SP Recovery Rate for the duration of the skill. 
[Lv 1]: Lasts 30 Seconds 
[Lv 2]: Lasts 45 Seconds 
[Lv 3]: Lasts 60 Seconds 
[Lv 4]: Lasts 75 Seconds 
[Lv 5]: Lasts 90 Seconds

MER_QUICKEN.name: Weapon Quicken
MER_QUICKEN.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Temporarily increase Attack Speed with Two Handed Sword Class Weapons. 
[Lv 1]: Lasts 30secs/14 SP 
[Lv 2]: Lasts 60Secs/18 SP 
[Lv 3]: Lasts 90Secs/26 SP 
[Lv 4]: Lasts 120Secs/28 SP 
[Lv 5]: Lasts 150Secs/30 SP 
[Lv 6]: Lasts 180Secs/34 SP 
[Lv 7]: Lasts 210Secs/38 SP 
[Lv 8]: Lasts 240Secs/42 SP 
[Lv 9]: Lasts 270Secss/46 SP 
[Lv 10]: Lasts 300Secs/50 SP

MER_SIGHT.name: Sight
MER_SIGHT.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Nullifies the Hide, Tunnel Drive and Cloaking effects within range.

MER_CRASH.name: Crash
MER_CRASH.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Physical attack 
Description: Deals a single hit with a chance to stun. 
[Lv 1]: 110% damage, 6% Stun 
[Lv 2]: 120% damage, 12% Stun 
[Lv 3]: 130% damage, 18% Stun 
[Lv 4]: 140% damage, 24% Stun 
[Lv 5]: 150% damage, 30% Stun

MER_REGAIN.name: Regain
MER_REGAIN.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Recovers the target from both sleep and stun status.

MER_TENDER.name: Tender
MER_TENDER.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Recovers the target from both freezing and stone status.

MER_BENEDICTION.name: Benediction
MER_BENEDICTION.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Recovers the target from both curse and blind status.

MER_RECUPERATE.name: Recuperate
MER_RECUPERATE.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Recovers the target from both poison and silence status.

MER_MENTALCURE.name: Mental Cure
MER_MENTALCURE.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Recovers the target from both hallucination and chaos status.

MER_COMPRESS.name: Compress
MER_COMPRESS.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Recovers the target from bleeding status.

MER_PROVOKE.name: Provoke
MER_PROVOKE.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Lowers the enemy Def and Vit Def by (5+5*SkillLV)% and increases their Atk by (2+3*SkillLV)%. Undead and Boss monsters are not affected. 
[Lv 1]: 53% Success, Target Attack +5%, Defense -10% 
[Lv 2]: 56% Success, Target Attack +8%, Defense -15% 
[Lv 3]: 59% Success, Target Attack +11%, Defense -20% 
[Lv 4]: 62% Success, Target Attack +14%, Defense -25% 
[Lv 5]: 65% Success, Target Attack +17%, Defense -30% 
[Lv 6]: 68% Success, Target Attack +20%, Defense -35% 
[Lv 7]: 71% Success, Target Attack +23%, Defense -40% 
[Lv 8]: 74% Success, Target Attack +26%, Defense -45% 
[Lv 9]: 77% Success, Target Attack +29%, Defense -50% 
[Lv 10]: 80% Success, Target Attack +32%, Defense -55%

MER_AUTOBERSERK.name: Auto Berserk
MER_AUTOBERSERK.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Passivewith activation 
Description: When your HP goes below 25%, you gain the effect of Provoke L10 on yourself. That means +32% damage and -60% Vit Def. The effect lasts until the character returns to more than 25% HP. The skill can be set to activate or not. The skill will even function after it has drained all your SP.

MER_DECAGI.name: Decrease agility
MER_DECAGI.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Decreases Agi of target by 2+SkillLV and reduces movement speed by 25%. The skill can fail and success is indicated by the text "Agi down" on the target at the time of casting.
A successful cast will dispel Increase Agility, Adrenaline Rush, Two-Hand Quicken, Spear Quicken and Cart Boost. The effects of this skill combine with Quagmire in the form Agi/2-2+SkillLV.
The formula for success is believed to be SuccessRate = 40 + 2*SkillLV + (BaseLV + Int)/5 - Target Mdef where SuccessRate is expressed as a percentage. Duration is halved on players. Does not work against Boss monsters. 
[Lv 1]: -3 Agi, -27 SP, 30 sec 
[Lv 2]: -4 Agi, -29 SP, 40 sec 
[Lv 3]: -5 Agi, -31 SP, 50 sec 
[Lv 4]: -6 Agi, -33 SP, 60 sec 
[Lv 5]: -7 Agi, -35 SP, 70 sec 
[Lv 6]: -8 Agi, -37 SP, 80 sec 
[Lv 7]: -9 Agi, -39 SP, 90 sec 
[Lv 8]: -10 Agi, -41 SP, 100 sec 
[Lv 9]: -11 Agi, -43 SP, 110 sec 
[Lv 10]: -12 Agi, -45 SP, 120 sec

MER_SCAPEGOAT.name: Scapegoat
MER_SCAPEGOAT.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active 
Description: The mercenary gives all of its remaining HP to the summoner and dies. Any excess HP is discarded.

MER_LEXDIVINA.name: Lex Divina
MER_LEXDIVINA.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active 
Description: This skill has a chance of inflicting the Silence status on the selected target. Does not work against Boss monsters. The chance is equal to 100 - (TargetVit + TargetLuk/8) + Int/15 %.
Casting this spell on a target that is already silenced will remove the silence status. 
[Lv 1]: Lasts 30 Seconds 
[Lv 2]: Lasts 35 Seconds 
[Lv 3]: Lasts 40 Seconds 
[Lv 4]: Lasts 45 Seconds 
[Lv 5]: Lasts 50 Seconds 
[Lv 6]: Lasts 60 Seconds 
[Lv 7]: Lasts 60 Seconds 
[Lv 8]: Lasts 60 Seconds 
[Lv 9]: Lasts 60 Seconds 
[Lv 10]: Lasts 60 Seconds

MER_ESTIMATION.name: Monster Property
MER_ESTIMATION.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Brings up a window with information about the targeted monster such as HP, element, level, etc at the time the spell is cast. Party members also see this window.

MER_KYRIE.name: Kyrie Eleison
MER_KYRIE.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active 
Description: Creates a Kyrie Eleison effect on the target character. This effect will block MaxHPofTarget*(10+2*SkillLV)% damage OR (5+SkillLV/2) hits, whichever is reached first.
Damage in excess of the amount blocked will transfer through and count as a hit of lowered damage. Hits are only assessed when a blow would normally land and not for every swing by a monster (despite showing an "Auto Guard" graphic with every swing for the effected player and a miss for every other player).
Any Magic attack will do full damage to the affected target, while still counting against the maximum damage and number of hits of Kyrie Eleison. Casting Holy Light or Assumptio on someone with this effect will cancel it entirely. When a second instance is cast on a target, then it will replace the first instance. 
[Lv 1]: 12% of Maximum HP, 5 attacks 
[Lv 2]: 14% of Maximum HP, 6 attacks 
[Lv 3]: 16% of Maximum HP, 6 attacks 
[Lv 4]: 18% of Maximum HP, 7 attacks 
[Lv 5]: 20% of Maximum HP, 7 attacks 
[Lv 6]: 22% of Maximum HP, 8 attacks 
[Lv 7]: 24% of Maximum HP, 8 attacks 
[Lv 8]: 26% of Maximum HP, 9 attacks 
[Lv 9]: 28% of Maximum HP, 9 attacks 
[Lv 10]: 30% of Maximum HP, 10 attacks

MER_BLESSING.name: Blessing
MER_BLESSING.description:
Skill Form: Supportive 
Description: Increase targeted player's Dex, Int and Str for
Blessing's duration. Can also cancel abnormal statuses from
Curse and Stone Curse.

MER_INCAGI.name: Increase Agility
MER_INCAGI.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Active 
HP Cost: 15 
Description: Increases Agi of target by 2+SkillLV and increases movement speed by 25%. Casting is accompanied by the "Agi UP" message over the target. Dispels Decrease Agility when cast. Dispelled by Decrease Agility and Quagmire.
A monster or player in the area of effect of a Quagmire spell cannot receive the benefits of Increase Agility.
This skill consumes some HP along with the SP cost. 
[Lv 1]: + 3 Agi 
[Lv 2]: + 4 Agi 
[Lv 3]: + 5 Agi 
[Lv 4]: + 6 Agi 
[Lv 5]: + 7 Agi 
[Lv 6]: + 8 Agi 
[Lv 7]: + 9 Agi 
[Lv 8]: + 10 Agi 
[Lv 9]: + 11 Agi 
[Lv 10]: + 12 Agi

GD_APPROVAL.name: Approval
GD_APPROVAL.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Passive 
Description: Certification as an official guild of the Rune Midgard Kingdom. Members of official guilds are authorized to attack the Emperium inside guild territories.
Without this skill all attacks on the Emperium will miss!! To disband a guild use the command /breakguild "guildname".

GD_KAFRACONTRACT.name: Kafra Contract
GD_KAFRACONTRACT.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Passive 
Description: Sign a contract with the Kafra Headquarter in Aldebaran. Through the contract the guild can hire a Kafra Employee for their castle who will provide warps and storage for the guild members.

GD_GUARDRESEARCH.name: Guardian Research
GD_GUARDRESEARCH.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Passive 
Description: Study the Guardian technology. Allows the guild to hire Guardians for their territory.

GD_GUARDUP.name: Build up the Guardian
GD_GUARDUP.description:
Max Level: 3
Skill Form: Passive 
Description: The guild Guardians gain bonuses to their Maximum HP, Atk and ASPD.

GD_EXTENSION.name: Guild Extension
GD_EXTENSION.description:
Max Level: 10
Skill Form: Passive 
Description: Increase the maximum capacity of guildsmen by +6 per SkillLV. 
[Level 1]: +6 people 
[Level 2]: +12 people 
[Level 3]: +18 people 
[Level 4]: +24 people 
[Level 5]: +30 people 
[Level 6]: +36 people 
[Level 7]: +42 people 
[Level 8]: +48 people 
[Level 9]: +52 people 
[Level 10]: +60 people

GD_GLORYGUILD.name: Guild's Glory
GD_GLORYGUILD.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Passive 
Description: Permits the use of a guild emblem.
Emblem Creation Process:
1. Select a design for the Emblem.
2. Emblems must be 24x24 pixels in BMP format using 256 colors
3. Create a folder named Emblem inside the Ragnarok Online folder (i.e. C:\Program Files\Gravity\RO) and copy the emblem file there.
If you are the guild master, you must place the emblem inside the Emblem folder in the game directory (i.e. C:\Program Files\Gravity\RO\Emblem).

GD_LEADERSHIP.name: Great Leadership
GD_LEADERSHIP.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Passive 
Description: All guild members in a 5x5 area around the Guild Leader will receive a +1*SkillLV Str bonus. Can only be used during guild sieges.

GD_GLORYWOUNDS.name: Wounds of Glory
GD_GLORYWOUNDS.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Passive 
Description: All guild members in a 5x5 area around the Guild Leader will receive a +1*SkillLV Vit bonus. Can only be used during guild sieges.

GD_SOULCOLD.name: Soul of Cold
GD_SOULCOLD.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Passive 
Description: All guild members in a 5x5 area around the Guild Leader will receive a +1*SkillLV Agi bonus. Can only be used during guild sieges. This skill is unconfirmed.

GD_HAWKEYES.name: Sharp Hawk Eyes
GD_HAWKEYES.description:
Max Level: 5
Skill Form: Passive 
Description: All guild members in a 5x5 area around the Guild Leader will receive a +1*SkillLV Dex bonus. Can only be used during guild sieges.

GD_BATTLEORDER.name: Battle Orders
GD_BATTLEORDER.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Support, Guild Master only 
Description: All guild members visible on the Guild Leaders screen will receive a +5 bonus to Str, Dex and Int.
This skill lasts for 1 minute, and caster must wait 5 minutes before using this skill again. Can only be used during guild sieges.

GD_REGENERATION.name: Regeneration
GD_REGENERATION.description:
Max Level: 3
Skill Form: Support, Guild Master only 
Description: All guild members visible on the Guild Leaders screen increase their HP and SP regeneration rate.
Once used, caster must wait 5 minutes before using this skill again. Can only be used during guild sieges. 
[Lv 1]: 2x HP regeneration rate 
[Lv 2]: 2x HP and SP regeneration rate 
[Lv 3]: 3x HP and SP regeneration rate

GD_RESTORE.name: Restore
GD_RESTORE.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Support, Guild Master only 
Description: All guild members visible on the Guild Master screen will have their HP and SP restored to 90% of the respective maximum.
Once used, caster must wait 5 minutes before using this skill again. Can only be used during guild sieges.

GD_EMERGENCYCALL.name: Emergency Call
GD_EMERGENCYCALL.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Support, Guild Master only 
Description: All guild members will be teleported next to the Guild Master.
Once used, caster must wait 5 minutes before using this skill again.

GD_DEVELOPMENT.name: Emsolute Develop
GD_DEVELOPMENT.description:
Max Level: 1
Skill Form: Passive 
Description: Gives 50% chance to get an additional, free economy point when investing into a castle's economy.
